    let importRows = [];
    let importHeader = [];
    let importSelectedIdx = -1;
    let importFileHandle = null;

    const importModal = document.getElementById('importModal');
    const importStepFile = document.getElementById('importStepFile');
    const importStepPreview = document.getElementById('importStepPreview');
    const importDropZone = document.getElementById('importDropZone');
    const importFileInput = document.getElementById('importFileInput');
    const importFileName = document.getElementById('importFileName');
    const importRowCount = document.getElementById('importRowCount');
    const importPreviewBody = document.getElementById('importPreviewBody');
    const importSetSelector = document.getElementById('importSetSelector');
    const importApplySetAll = document.getElementById('importApplySetAll');
    const importNewSetName = document.getElementById('importNewSetName');
    const importEditTitle = document.getElementById('importEditTitle');
    const importEditSetId = document.getElementById('importEditSetId');
    const importEditStyle = document.getElementById('importEditStyle');
    const importEditLevel = document.getElementById('importEditLevel');
    const importEditDefinition = document.getElementById('importEditDefinition');
    const importEditExtra = document.getElementById('importEditExtra');

    function openImportModal() {
        importModal.classList.remove('hidden');
        importStepFile.classList.remove('hidden');
        importStepPreview.classList.add('hidden');
        importRows = [];
        importHeader = [];
        importSelectedIdx = -1;
        importFileHandle = null;
        importFileName.textContent = '';
        importRowCount.textContent = '';
        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-gray-400 py-4">No data</td></tr>';
    }

    function closeImportModal() {
        importModal.classList.add('hidden');
    }

    // Drop zone / file picker
    importDropZone.addEventListener('click', () => importFileInput.click());

    importDropZone.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        importDropZone.classList.add('dragover');
    });
    importDropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
        importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
    });
    importDropZone.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
        const files = e.dataTransfer.files;
        if (files.length > 0 && files[0].name.endsWith('.csv')) {
            loadCsvPreview(files[0]);
        } else {
            alert('Please drop a .csv file');
        }
    });

    importFileInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
        if (e.target.files.length > 0) {
            loadCsvPreview(e.target.files[0]);
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('importChangeFileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        importFileInput.click();
    });

    document.getElementById('importCancelBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);
    document.getElementById('closeImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);
    importModal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target === importModal) closeImportModal();
    });

    document.getElementById('importCsvBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openImportModal);

    async function loadCsvPreview(file) {
        importFileHandle = file;
        importFileName.textContent = file.name;

        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('csv', file);

        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Parsing CSV...</td></tr>';

        try {
            const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=preview_csv&t=' + Date.now(), {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData,
                headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (!result.success) {
                alert('❌ ' + (result.error || 'Failed to parse CSV'));
                return;
            }

            importHeader = result.header || [];
            importRows = (result.rows || []).map(row => {
                const levelMap = {
                    'beginner': 'Beginner', 'a1': 'Beginner', 'a2': 'Beginner',
                    'intermediate': 'Intermediate', 'b1': 'Intermediate', 'b2': 'Intermediate',
                    'advanced': 'Advanced', 'c1': 'Advanced', 'c2': 'Advanced',
                };
                let level = (row.level || 'Beginner').trim();
                level = levelMap[level.toLowerCase()] || level;
                let type = (row.type || 'usage_cases').trim().toLowerCase();
                const validTypes = ['usage_cases', 'deep_dive', 'formula_table', 'multiple_choice', 'gap_fill'];
                if (!validTypes.includes(type)) type = 'usage_cases';
                return {
                    ...row,
                    _setName: (row.set || '').trim(),
                    type: type,
                    level: level,
                };
            });

            importRowCount.textContent = `(${result.total} rows)`;
            renderImportPreview();
            importStepFile.classList.add('hidden');
            importStepPreview.classList.remove('hidden');

        } catch (err) {
            alert('❌ Network error during CSV preview');
        }
    }

    function renderImportPreview() {
        const styleLabels = {
            usage_cases: '📘 Usage Cases',
            deep_dive: '🧠 Deep Dive',
            formula_table: '📐 Formula Table',
            multiple_choice: '❓ MCQ',
            gap_fill: '✏️ Gap Fill',
        };

        let html = '';
        importRows.forEach((row, idx) => {
            const isSelected = idx === importSelectedIdx;
            const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';
            const title = row.title || 'Untitled';
            const level = row.level || 'Beginner';
            const setName = row._setName || '';
            const preview = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
            const previewTrim = preview.length > 60 ? preview.substring(0, 60) + '...' : preview;
            const styleClass = style === 'multiple_choice' ? 'mcq' : (style === 'gap_fill' ? 'gap' : 'text');

            html += `<tr class="${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}" data-idx="${idx}">
                <td class="text-gray-400 text-xs">${idx + 1}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(setName)}</td>
                <td><span class="card-type ${styleClass}">${styleLabels[style] || style}</span></td>
                <td class="import-row-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</td>
                <td><span class="text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">${escapeHtml(level)}</span></td>
                <td class="text-gray-500 text-xs">${escapeHtml(previewTrim)}</td>
            </tr>`;
        });

        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = html;

        importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
            tr.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const idx = parseInt(tr.dataset.idx);
                selectImportRow(idx);
            });
        });

        if (importRows.length > 0 && importSelectedIdx < 0) {
            selectImportRow(0);
        }
    }

    function selectImportRow(idx) {
        if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
        importSelectedIdx = idx;
        const row = importRows[idx];

        importEditTitle.value = row.title || '';
        importEditStyle.value = row.type || 'usage_cases';
        importEditLevel.value = row.level || 'Beginner';

        // Try to determine the best set_id from _setName
        const setName = row._setName || '';
        let matchedSetId = '';
        if (setName) {
            const options = importEditSetId.options;
            for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {
                if (options[i].text === setName) {
                    matchedSetId = options[i].value;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        importEditSetId.value = matchedSetId || '';

        // Content fields
        const def = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
        const extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || row.correct_answer || '';

        importEditDefinition.value = def;
        importEditExtra.value = extra;

        // Highlight row
        importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
            tr.classList.toggle('selected', parseInt(tr.dataset.idx) === idx);
        });
    }

    function updateRowFromEditor(idx) {
        if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
        const row = importRows[idx];
        row.title = importEditTitle.value;
        row.type = importEditStyle.value;
        row.level = importEditLevel.value;

        const setId = importEditSetId.value;
        const setName = importEditSetId.options[importEditSetId.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
        if (setId) {
            row._setName = setName;
            row.set_id = setId;
        } else {
            row._setName = '';
            row.set_id = '';
        }

        row.definition = importEditDefinition.value;
        row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
        row.sentence = importEditDefinition.value;

        const extra = importEditExtra.value;
        if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {
            row.correct_answer = extra;
        } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
            // Parse options from extra (comma-separated, last is correct-index)
            row.correct_answer = '';
            row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
        } else {
            row.example1 = extra;
            row.tip = extra;
            row.usage1 = extra;

</details>

## Goal
- Restore checkout/preview step before CSV import so cards are reviewed before committing to database.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Two separate exclusivity layers: (1) User → Sets via `student_set_access` (empty = all, checked = only those) managed in user registry; (2) Set → Users via `exclusive_to` (secondary subtractive filter) managed in set registry. The set‑level filter must NOT show in the user list.
- Import must not go straight to DB — needs a preview/checkout modal where admin can see parsed cards, edit them, and confirm before final insert.
- Image/audio card styles must render properly (CSS rules for `max-height`, `width`, responsive flex layout).
- Student level on selector page must reflect the actual DB record.
- All `.whiteboard-card` borders must use handdrawn style (`border-radius: 255px 15px 225px 15px/15px 225px 15px 255px`).

## Progress
### Done
- Implemented `Card::ensurePatternTypeEnum()` — auto‑extends `pattern_type` ENUM on each `Card::save()`.
- Added `renderCardFront`/`renderCardBack` branches, flip/interaction/review handlers, and editor fields for `image_mcq`, `image_description`, `audio_listening` in `app.js` and `admin.js`.
- Updated `admin_cards.php` pattern‑type dropdown with all 8 types.
- Updated `export_csv.php` and `import_csv.php` for the three new types.
- Rewrote `import/CSV_STRUCTURE_FOR_AI.md` with full documentation.
- Added CSS to `app.css` for `.card-front img`, `.card-front audio`, `.image-mcq-media`, and changed `.card-front` to `display: flex; flex-direction: column`.
- Added null coalescing for `english_level` in `User::authenticate()` and `User::getById()`.
- Added session refresh from DB in `index.php` so admin‑level changes apply immediately.
- Changed `.whiteboard-card` border‑radius to handdrawn style in both `app.css` and `admin.css`.
- Added `Card::fixTruncatedPatternTypes()` + `api/migrate_types.php` + admin "🛠 Fix Card Types" button with notification.
- Updated `api/setup.php` CREATE TABLE to include all new pattern types.
- Added `exclusive_to` column to `card_sets` table via `CardSet::ensureTable()`.
- Updated `CardSet::create()`, `CardSet::update()`, `CardSet::getAll()`, `Review::getAccessibleSets()`, `User::getStudents()`.
- Added Manage Sets modal multiselect dropdown for exclusivity (admin.js, admin_cards.php).
- Fixed `api/get_sets.php` to look up username from user_id and pass to `Review::getAccessibleSets()`.
- Fixed `app.js` to pass `username` to `get_sets` API.
- Fixed `import/import_cards.php` to use `Card::save()` instead of raw SQL INSERT.
- Rewrote `Review::getAccessibleSets()` with two‑layer exclusivity logic (student_set_access as primary filter, exclusive_to as secondary subtractive filter).
- Reverted `CardSet::getWithCards()`, `index.php`, and `api/get_sets.php` to not filter by username (exclusivity now handled entirely in `getAccessibleSets`).
- Added `conversations/` and duplicate `.txt` to `.gitignore`.

### In Progress
- Restoring the CSV import checkout/preview modal that was present in earlier commits (shows parsed cards with live preview, checkboxes, inline editing before committing to DB).

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Exclusivity uses two independent layers: user‑registry set assignment (`student_set_access` table) is the primary filter; set‑registry student selection (`exclusive_to` column) is a secondary subtractive filter applied on top.
- `getAccessibleSets()` returns only explicit `student_set_access` entries when called without username (admin context), and falls back to all sets + applies `exclusive_to` filter when username is provided (student context).
- Import checkout must parse CSV client‑side, show a preview modal with per‑row checkboxes and editable fields, then send only confirmed rows to `api/import_csv.php`.
- Handdrawn border style copies the existing `.marker-border` values for all `.whiteboard-card` elements.

## Next Steps
1. Restore the CSV import preview/checkout modal in `admin.js` (parse CSV locally, show cards in a grid with front/back previews, checkboxes, inline editing, set‑mapping dropdown, then bulk‑insert via `import_csv.php`).
2. Push all changes to GitHub and trigger deploy.

## Critical Context
- The checkout/preview import flow existed in earlier commits (`92c1143`, `c4e8dbe`, `fbd2a3b`) but was removed/simplified. Need to restore it by reviewing those old diffs.
- Current import flow: file input → `api/import_csv.php` → direct DB insert via `Card::save()`; no client‑side preview or confirmation step.
- `api/import_csv.php` already handles bulk insert correctly; the checkout step just needs to be added on the JS side before calling it.
- The `exclusive_to` field must not appear on the user management page — it's only shown in the Manage Sets modal.

## Relevant Files
- `assets/js/admin.js`: contains import trigger + file input handler (lines 1059‑1084). Needs the checkout modal restored from old commits.
- `api/import_csv.php`: backend import handler (works, no changes needed for checkout).
- `src/Review.php`: `getAccessibleSets()` with two‑layer logic.
- `src/CardSet.php`: `exclusive_to` column support.
- `admin_cards.php`: Manage Sets modal HTML.
- `assets/css/app.css`, `assets/css/admin.css`: handdrawn borders, image/audio styles.

```
    let importRows = [];
    let importHeader = [];
    let importSelectedIdx = -1;
    let importFileHandle = null;

    const importModal = document.getElementById('importModal');
    const importStepFile = document.getElementById('importStepFile');
    const importStepPreview = document.getElementById('importStepPreview');
    const importDropZone = document.getElementById('importDropZone');
    const importFileInput = document.getElementById('importFileInput');
    const importFileName = document.getElementById('importFileName');
    const importRowCount = document.getElementById('importRowCount');
    const importPreviewBody = document.getElementById('importPreviewBody');
    const importSetSelector = document.getElementById('importSetSelector');
    const importApplySetAll = document.getElementById('importApplySetAll');
    const importNewSetName = document.getElementById('importNewSetName');
    const importEditTitle = document.getElementById('importEditTitle');
    const importEditSetId = document.getElementById('importEditSetId');
    const importEditStyle = document.getElementById('importEditStyle');
    const importEditLevel = document.getElementById('importEditLevel');
    const importEditDefinition = document.getElementById('importEditDefinition');
    const importEditExtra = document.getElementById('importEditExtra');

    function openImportModal() {
        importModal.classList.remove('hidden');
        importStepFile.classList.remove('hidden');
        importStepPreview.classList.add('hidden');
        importRows = [];
        importHeader = [];
        importSelectedIdx = -1;
        importFileHandle = null;
        importFileName.textContent = '';
        importRowCount.textContent = '';
        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center text-gray-400 py-4">No data</td></tr>';
    }

    function closeImportModal() {
        importModal.classList.add('hidden');
    }

    // Drop zone / file picker
    importDropZone.addEventListener('click', () => importFileInput.click());

    importDropZone.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        importDropZone.classList.add('dragover');
    });
    importDropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
        importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
    });
    importDropZone.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');
        const files = e.dataTransfer.files;
        if (files.length > 0 && files[0].name.endsWith('.csv')) {
            loadCsvPreview(files[0]);
        } else {
            alert('Please drop a .csv file');
        }
    });

    importFileInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
        if (e.target.files.length > 0) {
            loadCsvPreview(e.target.files[0]);
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('importChangeFileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        importFileInput.click();
    });

    document.getElementById('importCancelBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);
    document.getElementById('closeImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);
    importModal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target === importModal) closeImportModal();
    });

    document.getElementById('importCsvBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openImportModal);

    async function loadCsvPreview(file) {
        importFileHandle = file;
        importFileName.textContent = file.name;

        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('csv', file);

        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Parsing CSV...</td></tr>';

        try {
            const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=preview_csv&t=' + Date.now(), {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData,
                headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (!result.success) {
                alert('❌ ' + (result.error || 'Failed to parse CSV'));
                return;
            }

            importHeader = result.header || [];
            importRows = (result.rows || []).map(row => {
                const levelMap = {
                    'beginner': 'Beginner', 'a1': 'Beginner', 'a2': 'Beginner',
                    'intermediate': 'Intermediate', 'b1': 'Intermediate', 'b2': 'Intermediate',
                    'advanced': 'Advanced', 'c1': 'Advanced', 'c2': 'Advanced',
                };
                let level = (row.level || 'Beginner').trim();
                level = levelMap[level.toLowerCase()] || level;
                let type = (row.type || 'usage_cases').trim().toLowerCase();
                const validTypes = ['usage_cases', 'deep_dive', 'formula_table', 'multiple_choice', 'gap_fill'];
                if (!validTypes.includes(type)) type = 'usage_cases';
                return {
                    ...row,
                    _setName: (row.set || '').trim(),
                    type: type,
                    level: level,
                };
            });

            importRowCount.textContent = `(${result.total} rows)`;
            renderImportPreview();
            importStepFile.classList.add('hidden');
            importStepPreview.classList.remove('hidden');

        } catch (err) {
            alert('❌ Network error during CSV preview');
        }
    }

    function renderImportPreview() {
        const styleLabels = {
            usage_cases: '📘 Usage Cases',
            deep_dive: '🧠 Deep Dive',
            formula_table: '📐 Formula Table',
            multiple_choice: '❓ MCQ',
            gap_fill: '✏️ Gap Fill',
        };

        let html = '';
        importRows.forEach((row, idx) => {
            const isSelected = idx === importSelectedIdx;
            const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';
            const title = row.title || 'Untitled';
            const level = row.level || 'Beginner';
            const setName = row._setName || '';
            const preview = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
            const previewTrim = preview.length > 60 ? preview.substring(0, 60) + '...' : preview;
            const styleClass = style === 'multiple_choice' ? 'mcq' : (style === 'gap_fill' ? 'gap' : 'text');

            html += `<tr class="${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}" data-idx="${idx}">
                <td class="text-gray-400 text-xs">${idx + 1}</td>
                <td>${escapeHtml(setName)}</td>
                <td><span class="card-type ${styleClass}">${styleLabels[style] || style}</span></td>
                <td class="import-row-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</td>
                <td><span class="text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">${escapeHtml(level)}</span></td>
                <td class="text-gray-500 text-xs">${escapeHtml(previewTrim)}</td>
            </tr>`;
        });

        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = html;

        importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
            tr.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const idx = parseInt(tr.dataset.idx);
                selectImportRow(idx);
            });
        });

        if (importRows.length > 0 && importSelectedIdx < 0) {
            selectImportRow(0);
        }
    }

    function selectImportRow(idx) {
        if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
        importSelectedIdx = idx;
        const row = importRows[idx];

        importEditTitle.value = row.title || '';
        importEditStyle.value = row.type || 'usage_cases';
        importEditLevel.value = row.level || 'Beginner';

        // Try to determine the best set_id from _setName
        const setName = row._setName || '';
        let matchedSetId = '';
        if (setName) {
            const options = importEditSetId.options;
            for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {
                if (options[i].text === setName) {
                    matchedSetId = options[i].value;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        importEditSetId.value = matchedSetId || '';

        // Content fields
        const def = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
        const extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || row.correct_answer || '';

        importEditDefinition.value = def;
        importEditExtra.value = extra;

        // Highlight row
        importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {
            tr.classList.toggle('selected', parseInt(tr.dataset.idx) === idx);
        });
    }

    function updateRowFromEditor(idx) {
        if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;
        const row = importRows[idx];
        row.title = importEditTitle.value;
        row.type = importEditStyle.value;
        row.level = importEditLevel.value;

        const setId = importEditSetId.value;
        const setName = importEditSetId.options[importEditSetId.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
        if (setId) {
            row._setName = setName;
            row.set_id = setId;
        } else {
            row._setName = '';
            row.set_id = '';
        }

        row.definition = importEditDefinition.value;
        row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
        row.sentence = importEditDefinition.value;

        const extra = importEditExtra.value;
        if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {
            row.correct_answer = extra;
        } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice') {
            // Parse options from extra (comma-separated, last is correct-index)
            row.correct_answer = '';
            row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;
        } else {
            row.example1 = extra;
            row.tip = extra;
            row.usage1 = extra;
        }
    }

    document.getElementById('importApplyCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }
        updateRowFromEditor(importSelectedIdx);
        renderImportPreview();
        selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
    });

    document.getElementById('importApplyAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (importRows.length === 0) return;
        for (let i = 0; i < importRows.length; i++) {
            updateRowFromEditor(i);
        }
        renderImportPreview();
        if (importSelectedIdx >= 0) selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);
    });

    document.getElementById('importDeleteCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }
        if (!confirm('Remove this row from import?')) return;
        importRows.splice(importSelectedIdx, 1);
        importSelectedIdx = -1;
        renderImportPreview();
        if (importRows.length > 0) selectImportRow(0);
    });

    // Create new set from mapping bar
    document.getElementById('importCreateSetBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const name = importNewSetName.value.trim();
        if (!name) { alert('Enter a set name'); return; }
        const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=create_set', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ name })
        });
        const result = await response.json();
        if (result.success) {
            // Refresh both selectors
            const setsRes = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {
                headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
            });
            const setsData = await setsRes.json();
            if (setsData.success && setsData.sets) {
                const populateSelect = (sel, val) => {
                    const cur = sel.value;
                    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Select Set --</option>';
                    setsData.sets.forEach(s => {
                        sel.innerHTML += `<option value="${s.id}">${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`;

```

    });

    // Apply set mapping to all rows
    importApplySetAll.addEventListener('change', () => {
        if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {
            const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
            importRows.forEach(row => {
                row._setName = setName;
                row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;
            });
            renderImportPreview();
        }
    });

    importSetSelector.addEventListener('change', () => {
        if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {
            const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';
            importRows.forEach(row => {
                row._setName = setName;
                row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;
            });
            renderImportPreview();
        }
    });

    // Execute import
    document.getElementById('importExecuteBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (importRows.length === 0) { alert('No rows to import'); return; }
        if (!confirm(`Import ${importRows.length} cards?`)) return;

        // Build CSV from modified rows using fixed columns the import API expects
        const csvCols = ['set', 'set_id', 'type', 'title', 'level', 'definition', 'question_text', 'sentence', 'example1', 'example2', 'usage1', 'tip', 'correct_answer', 'explanation'];
        const csvRows = [csvCols.join(',')];

        importRows.forEach(row => {
            const vals = csvCols.map(col => {
                let val = '';
                if (col === 'set') {
                    val = row._setName || '';
                } else if (col === 'set_id') {
                    val = row.set_id || '';
                } else if (col === 'type') {
                    val = row.type || 'usage_cases';
                } else if (col === 'level') {
                    val = row.level || 'Beginner';
                } else if (col === 'title') {
                    val = row.title || '';
                } else if (col === 'definition' || col === 'question_text' || col === 'sentence') {
                    val = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';
                } else if (col === 'usage1' || col === 'tip') {
                    val = row.usage1 || row.tip || '';
                } else if (col === 'example1' || col === 'example2') {
                    val = row.example1 || row.example2 || '';
                } else if (col === 'correct_answer') {
                    val = row.correct_answer || '';
                } else {
                    val = row[col] || '';
                }
                // Escape CSV value
                if (val.includes(',') || val.includes('"') || val.includes('\n')) {
                    val = '"' + val.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"';
                }
                return val;
            });
            csvRows.push(vals.join(','));
        });

        const csvContent = csvRows.join('\n');
        const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv' });
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('csv', blob, (importFileHandle ? importFileHandle.name : 'import.csv'));

        try {
            const response = await fetch('api/import_csv.php', { method: 'POST', body: formData });
            const result = await response.json();
            if (result.success) {
                let msg = `✅ Imported ${result.imported} cards.`;
                if (result.errors.length) msg += `\n⚠️ ${result.errors.length} errors:\n` + result.errors.slice(0, 10).join('\n');
                if (result.errors.length > 10) msg += `\n...and ${result.errors.length - 10} more`;
                alert(msg);
                closeImportModal();
                await refreshSets();
                if (setSelector.value) loadCards(setSelector.value);
            } else {
                alert('❌ Import failed: ' + (result.error || 'Unknown error'));
            }
        } catch (err) {
            alert('❌ Network error during import');
        }
    });

    loadCardSets();
})();

```
        if ($action === 'preview_csv') {
            if (!isset($_FILES['csv']) || $_FILES['csv']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'CSV file required']);
                exit;
            }
            $handle = fopen($_FILES['csv']['tmp_name'], 'r');
            if (!$handle) {
                echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Cannot read file']);
                exit;
            }
            $header = fgetcsv($handle);
            if (!$header) {
                fclose($handle);
                echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Empty CSV']);
                exit;
            }
            $header = array_map('trim', $header);
            // Strip BOM from first column
            if (isset($header[0])) {
                $header[0] = preg_replace('/^\xEF\xBB\xBF/', '', $header[0]);
            }
            $rows = [];
            $maxRows = 100;
            while (($row = fgetcsv($handle)) !== false && count($rows) < $maxRows) {
                $row = array_slice(array_map('trim', $row), 0, count($header));
                $rows[] = array_combine($header, array_pad($row, count($header), ''));
            }
            fclose($handle);
            echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'header' => $header, 'rows' => $rows, 'total' => count($rows) >= $maxRows ? $maxRows . '+' : count($rows)]);
            exit;
        } elseif ($action === 'get_cards') {
            $setId = isset($_GET['set_id']) ? (int) $_GET['set_id'] : 1;
            echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'cards' => Card::getBySet($setId)]);
        } elseif ($action === 'get_sets') {
            echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'sets' => CardSet::getAll()]);
        } elseif ($action === 'get_card') {
            $cardId = isset($_GET['card_id']) ? (int) $_GET['card_id'] : 0;
            $card = Card::getById($cardId);
            if ($card) {
                $card['content_data'] = json_decode($card['content_data'], true);
                echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'card' => $card]);
            } else {
                echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Card not found']);
            }
        } elseif ($action === 'save_card') {
            $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
            $id = Card::save($data);
            echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'id' => $id]);
        } elseif ($action === 'delete_card') {
            $cardId = isset($_GET['card_id']) ? (int) $_GET['card_id'] : 0;
            Card::delete($cardId);
            echo json_encode(['success' => true]);
        } elseif ($action === 'get_users') {
            echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'users' => User::getAll()]);
        } elseif ($action === 'create_user') {
            $data = json_decode(file_get_contents('php://input'), true);
            $username = trim($data['username'] ?? '');
            $password = $data['password'] ?? '';
            $isAdmin = !empty($data['is_admin']);
            $fullName = trim($data['full_name'] ?? '');
            $englishLevel = $data['english_level'] ?? 'Beginner';
            if ($username === '' || strlen($password) < 6) {
                echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Username required, password min 6 chars']);
                exit;
            }
            $user = User::create($username, $password, $isAdmin, $fullName, $englishLevel);
            echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'user' => $user]);

.import-modal-content {
    background: white;

847:     function renderExclusiveSelect(exclusiveTo, students) {
848:         const selected = exclusiveTo ? exclusiveTo.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(s => s) : [];
849:         let opts = '<option value="">— No one (public) —</option>';
850:         students.forEach(s => {
851:             const sel = selected.includes(s.username) ? 'selected' : '';
852:             opts += `<option value="${escapeHtml(s.username)}" ${sel}>${escapeHtml(s.full_name || s.username)}</option>`;
853:         });
854:         return `<select class="exclusive-select text-xs mt-1 w-full" multiple size="4" style="border:2px solid #d1d5db;border-radius:8px;padding:4px;background:white;">${opts}</select>`;
855:     }
856: 
857:     async function loadSetsList() {
858:         if (!setListContainer) return;
859:         const students = await getStudents();

998:                 if (currentEditVal) editSetId.value = currentEditVal;

1000:                 data.sets.forEach(set => {
1001:                     setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value="${set.id}">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;

107:         $explanation = trim($data['explanation'] ?? '');
108:         $usage1 = trim($data['usage1'] ?? '');
109:         $tip = trim($data['tip'] ?? '');
110: 
111:         $examples = [];
112:         for ($i = 1; $i <= 4; $i++) {
113:             $val = trim($data["example$i"] ?? '');
114:             if (!empty($val)) $examples[] = $val;
115:         }
116: 
117:         $contentData = [];
118: 
119:         $imageUrl = trim($data['image_url'] ?? '');
120:         $audioUrl = trim($data['audio_url'] ?? '');
121:         $description = trim($data['description'] ?? '');
122:         $prompt = trim($data['prompt'] ?? '');
123:         $transcript = trim($data['transcript'] ?? '');
124: 
125:         if ($type === 'multiple_choice') {
126:             $options = [];
127:             for ($i = 1; $i <= 4; $i++) {
128:                 $val = trim($data["opt$i"] ?? '');
129:                 if (!empty($val)) $options[] = $val;
130:             }
131:             if (empty($options)) {
132:                 $errors[] = "Row $rowNum: Multiple choice needs at least one option";
133:                 continue;
134:             }
135:             $correctIdx = 0;
136:             if ($correctAnswer !== '') {
137:                 $correctIdx = (int) $correctAnswer;
138:                 if ($correctIdx < 0 || $correctIdx >= count($options)) $correctIdx = 0;
139:             }
140:             $contentData = [
141:                 'options' => $options,
142:                 'correct_index' => $correctIdx,
143:                 'question_text' => $questionText ?: 'Select the correct answer:',
144:                 'explanation' => $explanation,
145:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl,
146:                 'audio_url' => $audioUrl,
147:             ];
148:         } elseif ($type === 'gap_fill') {
149:             $answers = !empty($correctAnswer) ? array_map('trim', explode(',', $correctAnswer)) : ['answer'];
150:             $contentData = [
151:                 'sentence' => $sentence ?: 'Complete: ______',
152:                 'correct_answers' => $answers,
153:                 'example' => $examples[0] ?? '',
154:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl,
155:                 'audio_url' => $audioUrl,
156:             ];
157:         } elseif ($type === 'image_mcq') {
158:             $options = [];
159:             for ($i = 1; $i <= 4; $i++) {
160:                 $val = trim($data["opt$i"] ?? '');
161:                 if (!empty($val)) $options[] = $val;
162:             }
163:             if (empty($options)) {
164:                 $errors[] = "Row $rowNum: image_mcq needs at least one option";
165:                 continue;
166:             }
167:             $correctIdx = 0;
168:             if ($correctAnswer !== '') {
169:                 $correctIdx = (int) $correctAnswer;
170:                 if ($correctIdx < 0 || $correctIdx >= count($options)) $correctIdx = 0;
171:             }
172:             $contentData = [
173:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl,
174:                 'options' => $options,
175:                 'correct_index' => $correctIdx,
176:                 'question_text' => $questionText ?: 'Select the correct answer:',
177:                 'explanation' => $explanation,
178:             ];
179:         } elseif ($type === 'image_description') {
180:             $contentData = [
181:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl,
182:                 'description' => $description ?: $definition ?: 'No description',
183:             ];
184:         } elseif ($type === 'audio_listening') {
185:             $answers = !empty($correctAnswer) ? array_map('trim', explode(',', $correctAnswer)) : [];
186:             $contentData = [
187:                 'audio_url' => $audioUrl,
188:                 'prompt' => $prompt,
189:                 'correct_answers' => $answers,
190:                 'transcript' => $transcript,
191:                 'notes' => $transcript,
192:             ];
193:         } else {
194:             $contentData = [
195:                 'definition' => $definition ?: 'No definition',
196:                 'image_url' => $imageUrl,
197:                 'audio_url' => $audioUrl,
198:             ];
199:             if (!empty($usage1)) $contentData['usage1'] = $usage1;
200:             if (!empty($examples)) $contentData['example1a'] = $examples[0];
201:             if (!empty($tip)) $contentData['tip'] = $tip;
202:             if (count($examples) > 1) $contentData['example'] = $examples[1] ?? $examples[0];
203:         }
204: 
205:         if ($type === 'usage_cases' && empty($usage1) && !empty($examples)) {
206:             $contentData['usage1'] = $examples[0];
207:         }
208: 
209:         $cardId = isset($data['id']) && is_numeric($data['id']) ? (int) $data['id'] : 0;
210: 
211:         Card::save([
212:             'id' => $cardId,
213:             'set_id' => $setId,
214:             'title' => $title,
215:             'pattern_type' => $type,
216:             'level' => $level,
217:             'question_text' => ($type === 'multiple_choice' || $type === 'image_mcq') ? $questionText : '',
218:             'content_data' => $contentData,
219:         ]);
220:         $imported++;
221:     }
222: 
223:     fclose($handle);
224: 
225:     echo json_encode([
226:         'success' => true,
227:         'imported' => $imported,
228:         'errors' => $errors,
229:     ]);
230: } catch (Exception $e) {
231:     echo json_encode([
232:         'success' => false,
233:         'error' => $e->getMessage(),
234:     ]);
235: }

(End of file - total 235 lines)
</content>
```

importDropZone.classList.remove('dragover');\n        const files = e.dataTransfer.files;\n        if (files.length > 0 && files[0].name.endsWith('.csv')) {\n            loadCsvPreview(files[0]);\n        } else {\n            alert('Please drop a .csv file');\n        }\n    });\n\n    importFileInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n        if (e.target.files.length > 0) {\n            loadCsvPreview(e.target.files[0]);\n        }\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importChangeFileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        importFileInput.click();\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importCancelBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);\n    document.getElementById('closeImportBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeImportModal);\n    importModal?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n        if (e.target === importModal) closeImportModal();\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importCsvBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openImportModal);\n\n    async function loadCsvPreview(file) {\n        importFileHandle = file;\n        importFileName.textContent = file.name;\n\n        const formData = new FormData();\n        formData.append('csv', file);\n\n        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center py-4\"><div class=\"loader\"></div> Parsing CSV...</td></tr>';\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=preview_csv&t=' + Date.now(), {\n                method: 'POST',\n                body: formData,\n                headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }\n            });\n            const result = await response.json();\n\n            if (!result.success) {\n                alert('❌ ' + (result.error || 'Failed to parse CSV'));\n                return;\n            }\n\n            importHeader = result.header || [];\n            importRows = (result.rows || []).map(row => {\n                const levelMap = {\n                    'beginner': 'Beginner', 'a1': 'Beginner', 'a2': 'Beginner',\n                    'intermediate': 'Intermediate', 'b1': 'Intermediate', 'b2': 'Intermediate',\n                    'advanced': 'Advanced', 'c1': 'Advanced', 'c2': 'Advanced',\n                };\n                let level = (row.level || 'Beginner').trim();\n                level = levelMap[level.toLowerCase()] || level;\n                let type = (row.type || 'usage_cases').trim().toLowerCase();\n                const validTypes = ['usage_cases', 'deep_dive', 'formula_table', 'multiple_choice', 'gap_fill', 'image_mcq', 'image_description', 'audio_listening'];\n                if (!validTypes.includes(type)) type = 'usage_cases';\n                return {\n                    ...row,\n                    _setName: (row.set || '').trim(),\n                    type: type,\n                    level: level,\n                };\n            });\n\n            importRowCount.textContent = `(${result.total} rows)`;\n            renderImportPreview();\n            importStepFile.classList.add('hidden');\n            importStepPreview.classList.remove('hidden');\n\n        } catch (err) {\n            alert('❌ Network error during CSV preview');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function renderImportPreview() {\n        const styleLabels = {\n            usage_cases: '📘 Usage Cases',\n            deep_dive: '🧠 Deep Dive',\n            formula_table: '📐 Formula Table',\n            multiple_choice: '❓ MCQ',\n            gap_fill: '✏️ Gap Fill',\n            image_mcq: '🖼️ Image MCQ',\n            image_description: '🖼️ Image Desc',\n            audio_listening: '🎧 Audio Listening',\n        };\n\n        let html = '';\n        importRows.forEach((row, idx) => {\n            const isSelected = idx === importSelectedIdx;\n            const style = row.type || 'usage_cases';\n            const title = row.title || 'Untitled';\n            const level = row.level || 'Beginner';\n            const setName = row._setName || '';\n            const preview = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';\n            const previewTrim = preview.length > 60 ? preview.substring(0, 60) + '...' : preview;\n            const styleClass = style === 'multiple_choice' || style === 'image_mcq' ? 'mcq' : (style === 'gap_fill' ? 'gap' : 'text');\n\n            html += `<tr class=\"${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n                <td class=\"text-gray-400 text-xs\">${idx + 1}</td>\n                <td>${escapeHtml(setName)}</td>\n                <td><span class=\"card-type ${styleClass}\">${styleLabels[style] || style}</span></td>\n                <td class=\"import-row-title\">${escapeHtml(title)}</td>\n                <td><span class=\"text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded\">${escapeHtml(level)}</span></td>\n                <td class=\"text-gray-500 text-xs\">${escapeHtml(previewTrim)}</td>\n            </tr>`;\n        });\n\n        importPreviewBody.innerHTML = html;\n\n        importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {\n            tr.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const idx = parseInt(tr.dataset.idx);\n                selectImportRow(idx);\n            });\n        });\n\n        if (importRows.length > 0 && importSelectedIdx < 0) {\n            selectImportRow(0);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function selectImportRow(idx) {\n        if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;\n        importSelectedIdx = idx;\n        const row = importRows[idx];\n\n        importEditTitle.value = row.title || '';\n        importEditStyle.value = row.type || 'usage_cases';\n        importEditLevel.value = row.level || 'Beginner';\n\n        const setName = row._setName || '';\n        let matchedSetId = '';\n        if (setName) {\n            const options = importEditSetId.options;\n            for (let i = 0; i < options.length; i++) {\n                if (options[i].text === setName) {\n                    matchedSetId = options[i].value;\n                    break;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        importEditSetId.value = matchedSetId || '';\n\n        const def = row.definition || row.question_text || row.sentence || '';\n        const extra = row.example1 || row.usage1 || row.tip || row.correct_answer || '';\n\n        importEditDefinition.value = def;\n        importEditExtra.value = extra;\n\n        importPreviewBody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {\n            tr.classList.toggle('selected', parseInt(tr.dataset.idx) === idx);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function updateRowFromEditor(idx) {\n        if (idx < 0 || idx >= importRows.length) return;\n        const row = importRows[idx];\n        row.title = importEditTitle.value;\n        row.type = importEditStyle.value;\n        row.level = importEditLevel.value;\n\n        const setId = importEditSetId.value;\n        const setName = importEditSetId.options[importEditSetId.selectedIndex]?.text || '';\n        if (setId) {\n            row._setName = setName;\n            row.set_id = setId;\n        } else {\n            row._setName = '';\n            row.set_id = '';\n        }\n\n        row.definition = importEditDefinition.value;\n        row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;\n        row.sentence = importEditDefinition.value;\n\n        const extra = importEditExtra.value;\n        if (row.type === 'gap_fill') {\n            row.correct_answer = extra;\n        } else if (row.type === 'multiple_choice' || row.type === 'image_mcq') {\n            row.correct_answer = '';\n            row.question_text = importEditDefinition.value;\n        } else {\n            row.example1 = extra;\n            row.tip = extra;\n            row.usage1 = extra;\n        }\n    }\n\n    document.getElementById('importApplyCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }\n        updateRowFromEditor(importSelectedIdx);\n        renderImportPreview();\n        selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importApplyAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        if (importRows.length === 0) return;\n        for (let i = 0; i < importRows.length; i++) {\n            updateRowFromEditor(i);\n        }\n        renderImportPreview();\n        if (importSelectedIdx >= 0) selectImportRow(importSelectedIdx);\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importDeleteCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {\n        if (importSelectedIdx < 0) { alert('Select a row first'); return; }\n        if (!confirm('Remove this row from import?')) return;\n        importRows.splice(importSelectedIdx, 1);\n        importSelectedIdx = -1;\n        renderImportPreview();\n        if (importRows.length > 0) selectImportRow(0);\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importCreateSetBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n        const name = importNewSetName.value.trim();\n        if (!name) { alert('Enter a set name'); return; }\n        const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=create_set', {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({ name })\n        });\n        const result = await response.json();\n        if (result.success) {\n            await refreshSets();\n            importSetSelector.innerHTML = setSelector.innerHTML;\n            importEditSetId.innerHTML = editSetId ? editSetId.innerHTML : setSelector.innerHTML;\n            if (result.id) importSetSelector.value = String(result.id);\n            importNewSetName.value = '';\n        } else {\n            alert(result.error || 'Error creating set');\n        }\n    });\n\n    importApplySetAll.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {\n            const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';\n            importRows.forEach(row => {\n                row._setName = setName;\n                row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;\n            });\n            renderImportPreview();\n        }\n    });\n\n    importSetSelector.addEventListener('change', () => {\n        if (importApplySetAll.checked && importSetSelector.value) {\n            const setName = importSetSelector.options[importSetSelector.selectedIndex]?.text || '';\n            importRows.forEach(row => {\n                row._setName = setName;\n                row.set_id = importSetSelector.value;\n            });\n            renderImportPreview();\n        }\n    });\n\n    document.getElementById('importExecuteBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n        if (importRows.length === 0) { alert('No rows to import'); return; }\n        if (!confirm(`Import ${importRows.length} cards?`)) return;\n\n        const csvCols = ['set', 'set_id', 'type', 'title', 'level', 'definition', 'question_text', 'sentence', 'example1', 'example2', 'usage1', 'tip', 'correct_answer', 'explanation'];\n        const csvRows = [csvCols.join(',')];\n\n        importRows.forEach(row => {\n            const vals = csvCols.map(col => {\n                let val = '';\n                if (col === 'set') {\n                    val = row._setName || '';\n                } else if (col === 'set_id') {\n                    val = row.set_id || '';\n                } else if (col === 'type') {\n                    val = row.type || 'usage_cases';\n                } else if (col === 'level') {\n                    val = row.level || 'Beginner';\n                } else if (col === 'title') {\n                    val = row.title || '';\n                } else if (col === 'definition' || col === 'question_text' || col === 'sentence') {\n                    val = else if (col === 'example1' || col === 'example2') {\n                    val = row.example1 || row.example2 || '';\n                } else if (col === 'correct_answer') {\n                    val = row.correct_answer || '';\n                } else {\n                    val = row[col] || '';\n                }\n                if (val.includes(',') || val.includes('\"') || val.includes('\\n')) {\n                    val = '\"' + val.replace(/\"/g, '\"\"') + '\"';\n                }\n                return val;\n            });\n            csvRows.push(vals.join(','));\n        });\n\n ${result.errors.length} errors:\\n` + result.errors.slice(0, 10).join('\\n');\n                if (result.errors.length > 10) msg += `\\n...and ${result.errors.length - 10} more`;\n loadCardSets();"

{
  "filePath": "/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/assets/js/admin.js",
  "oldString": "    async function refreshSets() {\n        const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {\n            headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }\n        });\n        const data = await response.json();\n        if (data.success && data.sets) {\n            const currentVal = setSelector.value;\n            setSelector.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">-- Choose Card Set --</option>';\n            if (editSetId) {\n                const currentEditVal = editSetId.value;\n                editSetId.innerHTML = '';\n                data.sets.forEach(set => {\n                    setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value=\"${set.id}\">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;\n                    editSetId.innerHTML += `<option value=\"${set.id}\">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;\n                });\n                if (currentEditVal) editSetId.value = currentEditVal;\n            } else {\n                data.sets.forEach(set => {\n                    setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value=\"${set.id}\">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;\n                });\n            }\n            if (currentVal) setSelector.value = currentVal;\n        }\n    }",
  "newString": "    async function refreshSets() {\n        const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), {\n            headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }\n        });\n        const data = await response.json();\n        if (data.success && data.sets) {\n            const currentVal = setSelector.value;\n            const importVal = importSetSelector ? importSetSelector.value : '';\n            const importEditVal = importEditSetId ? importEditSetId.value : '';\n            setSelector.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">-- Choose Card Set --</option>';\n            if (editSetId) {\n                const currentEditVal = editSetId.value;\n                editSetId.innerHTML = '';\n                data.sets.forEach(set => {\n                    setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value=\"${set.id}\">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;\n                    editSetId.innerHTML += `<option value=\"${set.id}\">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;\n                });\n                if (currentEditVal) editSetId.value = currentEditVal;\n            } else {\n                data.sets.forEach(set => {\n                    setSelector.innerHTML += `<option value=\"${set.id}\">${escapeHtml(set.name)}</option>`;\n                });\n            }\n            if (currentVal) setSelector.value = currentVal;\n            // Sync import modal selectors\n            if (importSetSelector) {\n                importSetSelector.innerHTML = setSelector.innerHTML.replace('-- Choose Card Set --', '-- Select Set --');\n                if (importVal) importSetSelector.value = importVal;\n            }\n            if (importEditSetId) {\n                importEditSetId.innerHTML = editSetId ? editSetId.innerHTML : setSelector.innerHTML;\n                if (importEditVal) importEditSetId.value = importEditVal;\n            }\n        }\n    }"
}
```

<task id="ses_157f61d82ffenpf0E00NnFGA1t" state="completed">
<task_result>
Now I have a complete picture. Here is my comprehensive analysis of how random mode works and why it bypasses per-user set restrictions.

---

## Complete Analysis of the Random Mode Bug

### 1. Overview of the Random Mode Data Flow

There are **two related bugs** that cause random mode to ignore per-user set restrictions:

- **Bug A**: After an AJAX-based login, `currentStudent` lacks the `accessible_set_ids` property, causing the client to send no set filter, so the server returns ALL cards.
- **Bug B**: Even if `accessible_set_ids` is present, if `getAccessibleSets()` returns an **empty array**, the client-side condition `restrictedSets.length > 0` is false, so again no set filter is sent, returning ALL cards.

---

### 2. Where `accessible_set_ids` Is Set

**Only in `index.php` (lines 78-84):**

```php
$studentData['accessible_set_ids'] = Review::getAccessibleSets(
    (int) $studentData['id'], 
    $studentData['username'] ?? ''
);
```

This is embedded in the initial page render as part of `window.FLASHCARD_DATA.loggedInStudent`.

---

### 3. Bug A: AJAX Login Omits `accessible_set_ids`

**`api/login.php` (line 77)** returns student data from `User::authenticate()`:
```php
echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'student' => $user, 'new' => false]);
```

The `User::authenticate()` method (**`src/User.php` lines 33-50**) returns:
```php
['id', 'username', 'full_name', 'password_hash', 'is_admin', 'progress', 'english_level']
```

It **does not** include `accessible_set_ids`.

**`assets/js/app.js` (lines 104-113)** - the login handler:
```javascript
async function loginOrRegister(name, password, action, fullName = '', englishLevel = 'Beginner') {
    const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', { ... });
    if (res && res.success && res.student) {
        currentStudent = res.student;  // No accessible_set_ids!
        currentView = 'welcome';
        render();
        return res.student;
    }
}
```

When a user logs in via the AJAX API (without a full page reload), `currentStudent` is assigned the raw login response, which **lacks** `accessible_set_ids`.

---

### 4. How the Missing Property Causes the Bypass

**`assets/js/app.js` (lines 76-102)** - the critical function:

```javascript
async function loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levels, studentId, randomMode = false, studentLevel = '') {
    ...
    const body = {
        set_id: (randomMode || setId === null) ? '' : setId.toString(),
        student_id: studentId,
        levels: levels,
        random_mode: randomMode ? 'true' : 'false',
        student_level: studentLevel,
        due_only: dueOnlyMode
    };
    if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
        const filtered = phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id);        // ← DEAD CODE, result never used
        const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;  // ← undefined after AJAX login!
        if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
            body.set_ids = restrictedSets;   // ← NEVER REACHED if undefined/null/empty
        }
        // If restrictedSets is undefined/null/[], body.set_ids is NEVER SET
    }
    ...
}
```

When `currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids` is `undefined`:
- `restrictedSets` is `undefined`
- `restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0` evaluates to `false`
- `body.set_ids` is **never assigned**

---

### 5. What Happens Server-Side Without `set_ids`

**`api/get_cards.php` (lines 80-87)**:
```php
if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {   // !empty([]) === false
    $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
    $countSql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
    ...
}
```

**`src/Card.php` (lines 24-30)**:
```php
if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {   // !empty([]) === false
    $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
    $sql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
    ...
}
```

When `$setIds` is an empty array, `!empty($setIds)` is `false`, so **no `WHERE set_id IN (...)` clause is added**. The query returns cards from ALL sets, completely bypassing any per-user restrictions.

---

### 6. Bug B: Empty Array from `getAccessibleSets()`

**`src/Review.php` (lines 110-147)**:

```php
public static function getAccessibleSets(int $userId, string $username = ''): array
{
    // Layer 1: explicit assignments from student_set_access
    $allowed = ...;  // from student_set_access table

    // Admin context: return only explicit assignments
    if ($username === '') {
        return $allowed;  // may be empty []
    }

    // Student context: empty = ALL sets
    if (empty($allowed)) {
        $stmt = $pdo->query("SELECT id FROM card_sets");
        $allowed = array_map('intval', $stmt->fetchAll(\PDO::FETCH_COLUMN));
    }

    // Layer 2: exclusive_to filtering (REMOVES only, never ADDS)
    foreach ($exclusiveSets as $set) {
        if (in_array($setId, $allowed)) {
            $usernames = array_map('trim', explode(',', $set['exclusive_to']));
            if (!in_array($username, $usernames)) {
                $allowed = array_values(array_filter($allowed, fn($id) => $id !== $setId));
            }
        }
    }
    return $allowed;
}
```

**Problematic scenario**: If a user has entries in `student_set_access` AND **all** of those sets have their `exclusive_to` column set to exclude this user, then:
1. Layer 1 returns a non-empty `$allowed` (e.g., `[1, 2]`)
2. The "empty = all sets" fallback is skipped (because `$allowed` is non-empty)
3. Layer 2 removes all sets → `$allowed` becomes `[]`
4. Result: `getAccessibleSets()` returns `[]`

Then in the JS:
```javascript
const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;  // []
if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {  // false
    body.set_ids = restrictedSets;  // not executed
}
```

Again, `body.set_ids` is never set, and the server returns all cards.

Additionally, there is a **design issue**: `exclusive_to` is only used for **removal**, never for **inclusion**. If a set has `exclusive_to` containing the user's username, but the set is NOT in `student_set_access`, the user won't have access to it. The system has two parallel restriction mechanisms that don't interact correctly.

---

### 7. Dead Code in `loadCardsFromAPI`

**`assets/js/app.js` lines 87-93**:
```javascript
if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
    const filtered = phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id);  // ← assigned but NEVER USED
    const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;
    if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
        body.set_ids = restrictedSets;
    }
}
```

The variable `filtered` is computed but never referenced. This appears to be leftover debugging or abandoned refactoring code.

---

### 8. Summary of All Relevant Files and Methods

| File | Lines | What It Does |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `src/Review.php` | 110-147 | `getAccessibleSets()` - core access check; combines `student_set_access` + `exclusive_to` filtering |
| `src/Review.php` | 149-158 | `setAccessibleSets()` - admin assigns sets to users |
| `src/Card.php` | 5-61 | `getBySetAndLevels()` - main card query; skips set filter when `$setIds` is empty in random mode |
| `api/get_cards.php` | 1-137 | API endpoint; reads `random_mode` and `set_ids`; if `set_ids` empty in random mode, no set filtering |
| `api/login.php` | 1-81 | Login/register endpoint; does NOT return `accessible_set_ids` |
| `api/get_sets.php` | 1-41 | Returns sets; correctly applies `getAccessibleSets()` filter |
| `index.php` | 75-86 | Sets `FLASHCARD_DATA` with `accessible_set_ids` (only on initial page render) |
| `assets/js/app.js` | 76-102 | `loadCardsFromAPI()` - client-side; only sends `set_ids` if `accessible_set_ids` is non-empty |
| `assets/js/app.js` | 104-113 | `loginOrRegister()` - sets `currentStudent` from AJAX login response (missing `accessible_set_ids`) |

---

### 9. Root Cause Summary

The primary bug is **Bug A**: When a user logs in via the AJAX API (`api/login.php`), the student data returned does **not** include `accessible_set_ids`. The property is only set by `index.php` during the initial server-side page render. Since the AJAX login performs a client-side re-render (not a page reload), `currentStudent` permanently lacks `accessible_set_ids`. This causes `loadCardsFromAPI()` to omit the `set_ids` parameter in random mode requests, which causes `api/get_cards.php` to return cards from ALL sets without any restriction.

**The fix requires** either:
1. Adding `accessible_set_ids` to the login API response in `api/login.php`, or
2. Having the client fetch accessible sets from `api/get_sets.php` after login and populate `body.set_ids` from the result, or
3. Doing a full page redirect after AJAX login to re-initialize `FLASHCARD_DATA` from `index.php` (e.g., `window.location.reload()` after login).
</task_result>
</task>
```

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-06-08 20:10:58*

*[step-start part]*

Fixed. The bug was that `accessible_set_ids` was only set during the initial page render in `index.php` — AJAX logins via `api/login.php` never included it, so `body.set_ids` was never sent to `get_cards.php`, returning cards from all sets. Added `Review::getAccessibleSets()` to both the login and register responses.

## Findings in `/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/assets/js/app.js`

### 1. Keyboard Event Handler (Space/1/2/3) -- MISSING

**The keyboard handler does NOT exist in the current file.** The only `keydown` listener in app.js is for the Enter key on the login password input at **lines 185-186**:

```js
// Line 185-186
document.getElementById('authPasswordInput').addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') document.getElementById('loginBtn').click();
});
```

**What was removed:** A "Global keyboard shortcuts" block that looked like this (was in commit `58da15d` but got lost):

```js
// Global keyboard shortcuts
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || e.target.tagName === 'SELECT') return;
    if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey || e.altKey) return;

    if (currentView === 'study') {
        switch (e.key) {
            case ' ':       // Space -> flip card
                e.preventDefault();
                const flipBtn = document.getElementById('flipCardBtn');
                if (flipBtn) {
                    flipBtn.click();
                } else if (!document.getElementById('flashcardEl')?.classList.contains('flipped')) {
                    const el = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
                    if (el && currentCardObj) handleFlip(currentCardObj, currentQuizState, el);
                }
                break;
            case '1':       // 1 -> Again (1d)
                document.getElementById('againBtn')?.click();
                break;
            case '2':       // 2 -> Good (3d)
                document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.click();
                break;
            case '3':       // 3 -> Easy (7d)
                document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.click();
                break;
            case 'Escape':
                document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.click();
                break;
        }
    } else if (currentView === 'welcome') {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
            document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
        }
    }
});
```

The keyboard hint labels inside the rating buttons (`<span class="kb-hint">1</span>`, `<span class="kb-hint">2</span>`, `<span class="kb-hint">3</span>` and the `kb-hint` span saying `space` in the top bar) were also removed. The `<p>` tip at **line 740** now reads:
```html
<p class="text-center text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">💡 Tap card or FLIP to flip</p>
```
instead of the previous version that mentioned the keyboard shortcuts (`Tap card or press Space to flip · 1 2 3 to rate`).

---

### 2. Edit Button on Card -- MISSING

There is **no edit button (pencil icon) on the card** in the study screen. The card top-bar HTML at **lines 716-718** only shows FLIP and Exit buttons:

```js
// Lines 716-718 in renderStudyScreen()
<div class="flex gap-2">
    <button id="flipCardBtn" class="flip-btn px-3 py-1 md:px-4 md:py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-xs font-bold">🔄 FLIP</button>
    <button id="exitStudyBtn" class="text-red-600 font-bold bg-red-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs">Exit</button>
</div>
```

The edit button that was present in previous versions looked like:
```js
${currentStudent?.is_admin ? `<a href="admin_cards.php?focus_card=${card.id}&return_url=${encodeURIComponent(window.location.href)}" target="_blank" class="text-xs p-1 text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 font-bold" title="Edit this card">✏️</a>` : ''}
```

This was moved around in commits `7c31781` (added next to set name), `f0d4fcc` (moved to top bar next to flip/exit), and then completely lost in the branch merge.

The only edit-related UI remaining is the **Edit Profile button** on the Welcome screen at **line 255** and its modal at **lines 413-456**.

---

### 3. `renderStudyScreen()` function -- lines 692-828

This is the main render function for the study screen. It generates:

| Section | Lines | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| All-caught-up view | 693-700 | Message when no cards left |
| Card HTML template | 709-742 | Generates the entire card UI |
| Flip handler | 747-773 | Handles card flip logic for all patterns |
| Event listeners | 775-796 | Click handlers for flip, exit, MCQ options |
| Review handler | 798-823 | `handleReview(quality)` - records review, advances card |
| Rating button listeners | 825-827 | againBtn(0), goodBtn(2), easyBtn(3) |

---

### 4. Root Cause: Branch Merge Regression

The features were **lost due to a branch/rebase issue**:

- Commit `58da15d` ("Full makeover: SM-2 algorithm, keyboard shortcuts, auto-flip, sound FX, gamification, confetti, search, interactive previews") **added** all these features (keyboard handler, edit button, `getIntervalPreview`, `SoundFX`, `streakDays`, `currentQuizState`, `isFlipped`, `allDueReviewed`, `spawnConfetti`, etc.)

- Commit `04cabbd` ("Phase 1: security & data integrity fixes") was **based on a version of app.js that predated `58da15d`** (it builds on `bfe3790`). This commit was then merged/parented to create commits `13f9855` -> `9ff12f9` -> `b5ffe46` -> `d65c923` (current HEAD).

```
58da15d: has "Global keyboard shortcuts"     ✓
04cabbd: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗ (regression)
13f9855: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗
9ff12f9: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗
b5ffe46: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗
d65c923 (HEAD): does NOT have keyboard shortcuts ✗
```

The edit button on cards, the `getIntervalPreview()` function, `SoundFX`, `streakDays`, `currentQuizState`, `handleFlip()`, `handleAutoFlip()`, and `spawnConfetti()` were all lost in the same regression.

745:         const flashcard = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
746: 
747:         function flipHandler() {
748:             if (flashcard.classList.contains('flipped')) {
749:                 flashcard.classList.remove('flipped');
750:                 return;
751:             }
752: 
753:             if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
754:                 const containerId = pattern === 'image_mcq' ? '#mcqOptionsContainer' : '#mcqOptionsContainer';
755:                 const selected = document.querySelector(containerId + ' .quiz-option.selected');
756:                 if (selected) {
757:                     quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
758:                     quizState.answered = true;
759:                     const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
760:                     if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
761:                 }
762:             } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
763:                 const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
764:                 if (input) {
765:                     quizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
766:                     quizState.answered = true;
767:                     const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
768:                     if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
769:                 }
770:             }
771: 
772:             flashcard.classList.add('flipped');
773:         }
774: 
775:         document.getElementById('flipCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', flipHandler);
776: 
777:         flashcard?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
778:             if (e.target.closest('.quiz-option') || e.target.closest('#gapFillInput') || e.target.closest('audio') || e.target.closest('.btn-chalk')) {
779:                 return;
780:             }
781:             flipHandler();
782:         });
783: 
784:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
785:             const options = document.querySelectorAll('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option');
786:             options.forEach(opt => {
787:                 opt.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
788:                     e.stopPropagation();
789:                     options.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
790:                     opt.classList.add('selected');
791:                     quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(opt.getAttribute('data-idx'));
792:                 });
793:             });
794:         }
795: 
796:         document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { currentView = 'welcome'; render(); });
797: 
798:         const handleReview = async (quality) => {
799:             let wasCorrect = false;
800:             if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq' || pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
801:                 if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
802:                     const correctIdx = card.content_data?.correct_index || 1;
803:                     wasCorrect = (quizState.selectedIdx === correctIdx);
804:                 } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
805:                     const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || ['answer'];
806:                     wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === quizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase());
807:                 } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
808:                     const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || [];
809:                     if (correctAnswers.length) {
810:                         wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === quizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase());
811:                     } else if (card.content_data?.transcript) {
812:                         wasCorrect = card.content_data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === quizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
813:                     } else {
814:                         wasCorrect = true;
815:                     }
816:                 }
817:             } else {
818:                 wasCorrect = true;
819:             }
820:             await recordReview(card.id, currentStudent.id, quality, wasCorrect);
821:             currentIndex++;
822:             render();
823:         };
824: 
825:         document.getElementById('againBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(0));
826:         document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(2));
827:         document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(3));
828:     }
829: 
830:     loadSavedData();
831:     render();
832: })();

    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || e.target.tagName === 'SELECT') return;
        if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey || e.altKey) return;

        if (currentView === 'study') {
            switch (e.key) {
                case ' ':
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const flipBtn = document.getElementById('flipCardBtn');
                    if (flipBtn) {
                        flipBtn.click();
                    } else if (!document.getElementById('flashcardEl')?.classList.contains('flipped')) {
                        const el = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
                        if (el && currentCardObj) handleFlip(currentCardObj, currentQuizState, el);
                    }
                    break;
                case '1':
                    document.getElementById('againBtn')?.click();
                    break;
                case '2':
                    document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.click();
                    break;
                case '3':
                    document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.click();
                    break;
                case 'Escape':
                    document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.click();
                    break;
            }
        } else if (currentView === 'welcome') {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
            }
        }
    });

    loadSavedData();
    render();
})();

```

```
    function getIntervalPreview(card, quality) {
        const p = card?.progress;
        if (!p) {
            if (quality === 0) return '1d';
            if (quality === 2) return '3d';
            if (quality === 3) return '7d';
            return '';
        }
        const ef = parseFloat(p.ease_factor) || 2.5;
        const rep = parseInt(p.repetitions) || 0;
        const prev = parseInt(p.interval_days) || 0;
        if (quality === 0) return '1d';
        const newEF = Math.max(1.3, ef + (0.1 - (5 - quality) * (0.08 + (5 - quality) * 0.02)));
        if (rep === 0) { return quality === 3 ? '7d' : '3d'; }
        if (rep === 1) { return quality === 3 ? '7d' : '3d'; }
        const base = Math.round(prev * newEF);
        return Math.round(base * (quality === 3 ? 1.3 : 1)) + 'd';
    }

- **Interval previews**: `(1d)` / `(3d)` / `(7d+)` on rating buttons, dynamically computed from SM-2 progress
