201: 
202:     function getGapFillHint(card) {
203:         const title = (card.title || '').toLowerCase();
204:         const content = card.content_data || {};
205: 
206:         if (title.includes('past') || title.includes('simple past')) {
207:             return '📝 Use Simple Past tense';
208:         } else if (title.includes('present perfect')) {
209:             return '📝 Use Present Perfect (have/has + past participle)';
210:         } else if (title.includes('modal') || title.includes('can') || title.includes('could') || title.includes('should') || title.includes('must')) {
211:             return '📝 Use a modal verb (can, could, should, must, might, etc.)';
212:         } else if (title.includes('future') || title.includes('will')) {
213:             return '📝 Use Future (will + base verb)';
214:         } else if (title.includes('continuous') || title.includes('progressive')) {
215:             return '📝 Use Continuous form (am/is/are/was/were + verb-ing)';
216:         } else if (title.includes('passive')) {
217:             return '📝 Use Passive voice (be + past participle)';
218:         } else if (title.includes('conditional')) {
219:             return '📝 Use Conditional (would/could/might + base verb)';
220:         } else if (content.sentence) {
221:             if (content.sentence.includes('yesterday') || content.sentence.includes('last week') || content.sentence.includes('ago')) {
222:                 return '📝 Hint: This happened in the past → use Simple Past';
223:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('tomorrow') || content.sentence.includes('next week')) {
224:                 return '📝 Hint: This will happen in the future → use Future (will)';
225:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('every day') || content.sentence.includes('usually') || content.sentence.includes('always')) {
226:                 return '📝 Hint: This is a habit/routine → use Simple Present';
227:             } else if (content.sentence.includes('now') || content.sentence.includes('right now')) {
228:                 return '📝 Hint: This is happening now → use Present Continuous';
229:             }
230:         }
231:         return '📝 Type the correct form of the verb in parentheses';
232:     }
233: 
234:     async function renderWelcomeScreen() {
235:         appEl.innerHTML = `<div class="whiteboard-card p-4 text-center"><div class="loader mx-auto mb-2"></div><p>Loading card sets...</p></div>`;
236:         const sets = await loadCardSetsFromAPI();
237:         const randomSelected = (currentSet === null || isRandomMode);
238:         const setsHtml = `<option value="" ${randomSelected ? 'selected' : ''}>🎲 RANDOM MODE - All Sets</option>` +
239:             sets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelected ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
240: 
241:         const stats = await loadStats();
242: 
243:         const html = `
244:             <div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-6 shadow-2xl">
245:                 <div class="text-center mb-4 md:mb-5">
246:                     <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-4xl text-blue-900 marker-underline"><span class="text-3xl md:text-4xl">🎓</span> Flashcard Studio <span class="text-xl md:text-2xl">✏️</span></h1>
247:                     <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm md:text-lg mt-1">spaced repetition · tap card to flip</p>
248:                 </div>
249:                 <div class="space-y-4 md:space-y-5">
250:                     <div class="md:grid md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-5">
251:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
252:                         <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 flex-wrap gap-2">
253:                             <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 title-font">👤 Student</label>
254:                             <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
255:                                 <span class="student-badge">✅ ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.username || currentStudent?.name)}</span>
256:                                 <button id="editProfileBtn" class="text-xs text-blue-600 underline whitespace-nowrap">✏️ Edit</button>
257:                             </div>
258:                         </div>
259:                         <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">📝 ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.full_name || currentStudent?.username)}</div>
260:                         <div class="flex gap-4 mt-2 text-sm items-center">
261:                             <span>🎯 Level: <strong>${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.english_level || 'Beginner')}</strong></span>
262:                             <a href="?logout=1" class="text-xs text-red-600 underline ml-auto">Logout</a>
263:                         </div>
264:                     </div>
265:                     ${stats ? `
266:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
267:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 title-font">📈 Study Stats</label>
268:                         <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 text-center">
269:                             <div class="bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl">
270:                                 <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700">${stats.total_reviews}</div>
271:                                 <div class="text-xs text-gray-600">Total Reviews</div>
272:                             </div>
273:                             <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl">
274:                                 <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-green-700">${stats.correct_count}</div>
275:                                 <div class="text-xs text-gray-600">Correct</div>
276:                             </div>
277:                             <div class="bg-red-50 p-3 rounded-xl">
278:                                 <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-red-700">${stats.incorrect_count}</div>
279:                                 <div class="text-xs text-gray-600">Incorrect</div>
280:                             </div>
281:                             <div class="bg-purple-50 p-3 rounded-xl">
282:                                 <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-700">${stats.cards_reviewed}</div>
283:                                 <div class="text-xs text-gray-600">Cards Seen</div>
284:                             </div>
285:                         </div>
286:                         <div class="mt-3">
287:                             <div class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">📊 Progress:</div>
288:                             <div class="progress-bar-container" style="max-width:100%;" data-pct="${Math.round(currentStudent?.progress || 0)}%"><div class="progress-bar-fill" style="width: ${currentStudent?.progress || 0}%"></div></div>
289:                         </div>
290:                         ${stats.due_today > 0 ? `<button id="dueReviewBtn" class="text-xs text-orange-600 mt-2 font-bold cursor-pointer hover:text-orange-800 underline" style="background:none;border:none;padding:0;font:inherit;">📅 ${stats.due_today} card${stats.due_today > 1 ? 's' : ''} due for review today!</button>` : ''}
291:                     </div>
292:                     ` : ''}
293:                     </div>
294:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
295:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2 title-font">📖 Card Set</label>
296:                         <select id="setSelect" class="w-full p-2 md:p-3 text-base md:text-lg border-2 rounded-xl bg-white">${setsHtml}</select>
297:                         <button id="refreshSetsBtn" class="mt-2 text-xs text-blue-600 underline">⟳ Refresh (show non-empty sets)</button>
298:                     </div>
299:                     <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
300:                         <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 title-font">🎯 Difficulty Levels</label>
301:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Leave unselected to auto-pick your level (${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.english_level || 'Beginner')})</p>
302:                         <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2 md:gap-4">
303:                             ${['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'].map(lvl => `
304:                                 <button data-level="${lvl}" class="level-picker px-4 md:px-6 py-1 md:py-2 text-sm md:text-xl rounded-full border-2 transition-all ${selectedLevels.includes(lvl) ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white border-blue-800' : 'bg-white border-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-100'}">${lvl}</button>
305:                             `).join('')}
306:                         </div>
307:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">💡 Select levels, then click START to filter cards</p>
308:                     </div>
309:                     <button id="launchStudyBtn" class="w-full bg-blue-700 text-white py-3 md:py-4 text-xl md:text-2xl title-font rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:translate-y-1 transition-all">🚀 START STUDYING →</button>
310:                     <button id="switchStudentBtn" class="w-full text-gray-500 py-2 text-xs md:text-sm underline">↺ Switch student</button>
311:                 </div>
312:                 <div class="teacher-script mt-5 md:mt-6 p-2 md:p-3 text-center text-gray-500 text-xs md:text-sm bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg">
313:                     💡 Tap any card to flip it! For multiple choice, tap your answer then flip to check.
314:                 </div>
315:             </div>
316:         `;
317:         appEl.innerHTML = html;
318: 
319:         document.querySelectorAll('.level-picker').forEach(btn => {
320:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
321:                 const lvl = btn.getAttribute('data-level');
322:                 if (selectedLevels.includes(lvl)) {
323:                     selectedLevels = selectedLevels.filter(l => l !== lvl);
324:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
325:                     btn.classList.add('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
326:                 } else {
327:                     selectedLevels.push(lvl);
328:                     btn.classList.add('bg-blue-600', 'text-white', 'border-blue-800');
329:                     btn.classList.remove('bg-white', 'border-gray-400', 'hover:bg-gray-100');
330:                 }
331:                 saveSessionState();
332:             });
333:         });
334: 
335:         document.getElementById('refreshSetsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
336:             displayStatusMessage('Refreshing card sets (non-empty only)...', 'info');
337:             const freshSets = await loadCardSetsFromAPI();
338:             const selectEl = document.getElementById('setSelect');
339:             if (selectEl && freshSets.length) {
340:                 const randomSelectedNow = (currentSet === null || isRandomMode);
341:                 selectEl.innerHTML = '<option value="" ' + (randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : '') + '>🎲 RANDOM MODE - All Sets</option>' +
342:                     freshSets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');
343:                 displayStatusMessage(`Loaded ${freshSets.length} card sets (only those with cards)`, 'success');
344:             } else {
345:                 displayStatusMessage('No card sets with cards found!', 'warning');
346:             }
347:         });
348: 
349:         document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
350:             const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
351:             const selectedValue = setSelect?.value;
352:             const randomMode = (selectedValue === "");
353:             let setId = null;
354:             if (!randomMode) setId = parseInt(selectedValue);
355: 
356:             const levelsToUse = selectedLevels.length > 0 ? selectedLevels : [];
357:             const studentLevel = currentStudent?.english_level || '';
358: 
359:             displayStatusMessage(randomMode ? 'Loading random cards from ALL sets...' : `Loading cards...`, 'info');
360: 
361:             isRandomMode = randomMode;
362:             currentSet = randomMode ? null : { id: setId };
363:             saveSessionState();
364: 
365:             const cards = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levelsToUse, currentStudent.id, randomMode, studentLevel);
366:             if (!cards || cards.length === 0) {
367:                 if (allDueReviewed) {
368:                     currentCards = [];
369:                     currentIndex = 0;
370:                     currentView = 'study';
371:                     render();
372:                     return;
373:                 }
374:                 if (selectedLevels.length === 0) {
375:                     displayStatusMessage('No cards at your level. Trying all levels...', 'warning');
376:                     const fallback = await loadCardsFromAPI(setId, ['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'], currentStudent.id, randomMode);
377:                     if (fallback && fallback.length > 0) {
378:                         currentCards = fallback;
379:                         currentIndex = 0;
380:                         currentView = 'study';
381:                         render();
382:                         return;
383:                     }
384:                 }
385:                 alert('No cards found for the selected filters! Try different difficulty levels.');
386:                 return;
387:             }
388:             if (randomMode) {
389:                 for (let i = cards.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
390:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
391:                     [cards[i], cards[j]] = [cards[j], cards[i]];
392:                 }
393:             }
394:             currentCards = cards;
395:             currentIndex = 0;
396:             currentView = 'study';
397:             render();
398:         });
399: 
400:         document.getElementById('appRoot')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
401:             if (e.target.id === 'dueReviewBtn') {
402:                 dueOnlyMode = true;
403:                 const setSelect = document.getElementById('setSelect');
404:                 if (setSelect) setSelect.value = '';
405:                 document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
406:             }
407:         });
408: 
409:         document.getElementById('switchStudentBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => clearStudent());
410: 
411:         document.getElementById('editProfileBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openEditProfileModal);
412:     }
413: 
414:     function openEditProfileModal() {
415:         const existing = document.getElementById('editProfileModal');
416:         if (existing) existing.remove();
417: 
418:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
419:         modal.id = 'editProfileModal';
420:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;';
421:         modal.innerHTML = `
422:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:400px;width:90%;padding:24px;">
423:                 <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">✏️ Edit Profile</h3>
424:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
425:                 <input type="text" id="editProfileFullName" class="form-input w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3" value="${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.full_name || '')}">
426:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
427:                 <select id="editProfileLevel" class="form-select w-full p-2 border-2 rounded-xl mb-3 bg-white">
428:                     <option value="Beginner" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
429:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
430:                     <option value="Advanced" ${currentStudent?.english_level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
431:                 </select>
432:                 <div class="flex gap-2">
433:                     <button id="saveProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">💾 Save</button>
434:                     <button id="cancelProfileBtn" class="flex-1 bg-gray-300 text-gray-800 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold">Cancel</button>
435:                 </div>
436:                 <p id="editProfileError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden"></p>
437:             </div>
438:         `;
439:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
440: 
441:         document.getElementById('cancelProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
442:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
443: 
444:         document.getElementById('saveProfileBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
445:             const fullName = document.getElementById('editProfileFullName').value.trim();
446:             const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editProfileLevel').value;
447: 
448:             const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', {
449:                 action: 'update_profile',
450:                 user_id: currentStudent.id,
451:                 full_name: fullName,
452:                 english_level: englishLevel
453:             });
454:             if (res && res.success) {
455:                 currentStudent.full_name = fullName;
456:                 currentStudent.english_level = englishLevel;
457:                 modal.remove();
458:                 render();
459:             } else {
460:                 alert(res?.error || 'Error updating profile');
461:             }
462:         });
463:     }
464: 
465:     function renderCardFront(card) {
466:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
467:         const data = card.content_data || {};
468:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
469: 
470:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
471:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
472:             const gridClass = options.length > 3 ? 'grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3' : 'space-y-3';
473:             return `
474:                 <div class="text-center">
475:                     <p class="text-lg mb-3 font-bold">❓ ${escapeHtml(card.question_text || 'Select the correct answer:')}</p>
476:                     <div class="${gridClass}" id="mcqOptionsContainer">
477:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${escapeHtml(opt)}</div>`).join('')}
478:                     </div>
479:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap your answer, then flip the card</p>
480:                 </div>
481:             `;
482:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
483:             const sentence = data.sentence || 'Complete the sentence: ______';
484:             const hint = getGapFillHint(card);
485:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
486:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
487:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
488:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
489:             const mediaHtml = (hasImage || hasAudio) ? `
490:                 <div class="w-full flex justify-center mb-2">
491:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-40 object-contain rounded-lg" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : ''}
492:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : ''}
493:                 </div>
494:             ` : '';
495:             return `
496:                 <div class="text-center">
497:                     ${mediaHtml}
498:                     <p class="text-lg mb-1 font-bold">✏️ Complete the sentence:</p>
499:                     <p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-3 rounded-xl mb-1">${escapeHtml(sentence)}</p>
500:                     <div class="context-hint">${hint}</div>
501:                     <input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2">
502:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Type answer, then flip to check</p>
503:                 </div>
504:             `;
505:         } else if (pattern === 'image_mcq') {
506:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
507:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
508:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
509:             return `
510:                 <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 md:gap-4 h-full min-h-[200px]">
511:                     <div class="flex items-center justify-center md:w-1/2 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-2">
512:                         ${hasImage
513:                             ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-48 md:max-h-full w-full object-contain rounded-lg" onerror="this.style.display='none'">`
514:                             : `<div class="text-6xl text-gray-300">🖼️</div>`
515:                         }
516:                     </div>
517:                     <div class="flex flex-col justify-center md:w-1/2 gap-2" id="mcqOptionsContainer">
518:                         <p class="text-sm font-bold text-center md:text-left mb-1">Select the correct answer:</p>
519:                         ${options.map((opt, idx) => `<div class="quiz-option text-sm md:text-base py-2 px-3" data-idx="${idx}">${String.fromCharCode(65+idx)}. ${escapeHtml(opt)}</div>`).join('')}
520:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1 text-center">👆 Tap your answer, then flip</p>
521:                     </div>
522:                 </div>
523:             `;
524:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
525:             const imageUrl = data.image_url || '';
526:             const hasImage = imageUrl && (imageUrl.startsWith('http://') || imageUrl.startsWith('https://') || imageUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
527:             return `
528:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
529:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🖼️ ${escapeHtml(title)}</h1>
530:                     ${hasImage ? `<img src="${escapeHtml(imageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(title)}" class="max-h-48 md:max-h-64 rounded-xl shadow-md mb-2 object-contain" onerror="this.style.display='none'">` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🖼️</div>`}
531:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
532:                 </div>
533:             `;
534:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
535:             const audioUrl = data.audio_url || '';
536:             const hasAudio = audioUrl && (audioUrl.startsWith('http://') || audioUrl.startsWith('https://') || audioUrl.startsWith('uploads/'));
537:             const prompt = data.prompt || '';
538:             const isInteractive = !!(prompt || data.correct_answers);
539:             return `
540:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
541:                     <h1 class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-center font-bold marker-underline mb-3">🎧 ${escapeHtml(title)}</h1>
542:                     ${hasAudio ? `<audio controls class="w-full max-w-xs mb-2" src="${escapeHtml(audioUrl)}">Your browser does not support audio.</audio>` : `<div class="text-6xl mb-2">🎧</div>`}
543:                     ${prompt ? `<p class="text-sm bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-xl mb-1">${escapeHtml(prompt)}</p>` : ''}
544:                     ${isInteractive ? `<input type="text" id="gapFillInput" placeholder="Type your answer..." class="w-full p-2 text-sm border-2 rounded-xl mb-2">` : ''}
545:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">👆 Tap card to flip${isInteractive ? ' after answering' : ''}</p>
546:                 </div>
547:             `;
548:         } else {
549:             return `
550:                 <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full min-h-[200px]">
551:                     <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-center font-bold marker-underline">${escapeHtml(title)}</h1>
552:                     <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-3">👆 Tap card to flip</p>
553:                 </div>
554:             `;
555:         }
556:     }
557: 
558:     function renderCardBack(card, quizState = null) {
559:         const data = card.content_data || {};
560:         const pattern = card.pattern_type;
561:         const title = card.title || 'Flashcard';
562: 
563:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
564:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
565:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
566:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
567:             const selectedIdx = quizState?.selectedIdx;
568:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
569:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
570: 
571:             return `
572:                 <div class="back-content">
573:                     <div class="text-center">
574:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
575:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
576:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${escapeHtml(correctAnswer)}</p>
577:                         </div>
578:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
579:                             <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. The correct answer is ${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}.`}</p>
580:                         </div>
581:                         ${explanation ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
582:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
583:                     </div>
584:                 </div>
585:             `;
586:         } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
587:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || ['answer'];
588:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
589:             const isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
590:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example || ''));
591: 
592:             return `
593:                 <div class="back-content">
594:                     <div class="text-center">
595:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Correct Answer</h3>
596:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
597:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${escapeHtml(correctAnswers.join(' / '))}</p>
598:                         </div>
599:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
600:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
601:                         </div>
602:                         ${example ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 Example: ${example}</div>` : ''}
603:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
604:                     </div>
605:                 </div>
606:             `;
607:         } else if (pattern === 'image_mcq') {
608:             const options = data.options || ['Option A', 'Option B', 'Option C'];
609:             const correctIdx = data.correct_index !== undefined ? data.correct_index : 1;
610:             const correctAnswer = options[correctIdx];
611:             const selectedIdx = quizState?.selectedIdx;
612:             const isCorrect = (selectedIdx === correctIdx);
613:             const explanation = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.explanation || ''));
614: 
615:             return `
616:                 <div class="back-content">
617:                     <div class="text-center">
618:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">✓ Answer</h3>
619:                         <div class="bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">
620:                             <p class="text-base font-bold">${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}. ${escapeHtml(correctAnswer)}</p>
621:                         </div>
622:                         ${selectedIdx !== null ? `
623:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
624:                             <p class="text-sm">${isCorrect ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Incorrect. The correct answer is ${String.fromCharCode(65+correctIdx)}.`}</p>
625:                         </div>
626:                         ` : ''}
627:                         ${explanation ? `<div class="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">📝 ${explanation}</div>` : ''}
628:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
629:                     </div>
630:                 </div>
631:             `;
632:         } else if (pattern === 'image_description') {
633:             const description = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.description || 'No description'));
634:             return `
635:                 <div class="back-content">
636:                     <div class="text-center">
637:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
638:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
639:                             ${description}
640:                         </div>
641:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
642:                     </div>
643:                 </div>
644:             `;
645:         } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
646:             const transcript = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.transcript || data.notes || ''));
647:             const correctAnswers = data.correct_answers || [];
648:             const userAnswer = quizState?.userAnswer || '';
649:             const isInteractive = !!(data.prompt || correctAnswers.length);
650:             let isMatch = false;
651:             if (userAnswer && correctAnswers.length) {
652:                 isMatch = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === userAnswer.toLowerCase());
653:             } else if (userAnswer && data.transcript) {
654:                 isMatch = data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
655:             }
656:             return `
657:                 <div class="back-content">
658:                     <div class="text-center">
659:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-green-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
660:                         ${transcript ? `<div class="card-definition bg-green-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-green-300 mb-2">${transcript}</div>` : ''}
661:                         ${isInteractive && userAnswer ? `
662:                         <div class="p-2 rounded-lg mb-2 ${isMatch ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'}">
663:                             <p class="text-sm">${isMatch ? '✅ Correct!' : `❌ Your answer: "${escapeHtml(userAnswer)}"`}</p>
664:                         </div>
665:                         ` : isInteractive && !userAnswer ? `<p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2">Type what you heard above, then flip.</p>` : ''}
666:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
667:                     </div>
668:                 </div>
669:             `;
670:         } else {
671:             const definition = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.definition || data.usage1 || 'No definition available'));
672:             const example = formatBreaks(escapeHtml(data.example1a || data.example || ''));
673: 
674:             return `
675:                 <div class="back-content">
676:                     <div class="text-center">
677:                         <h3 class="text-lg text-blue-700 title-font marker-underline mb-2">${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>
678:                         <div class="card-definition bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-300">
679:                             ${definition}
680:                         </div>
681:                         ${example ? `
682:                             <div class="mt-2 p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg">
683:                                 <p class="text-sm"><strong>Example:</strong> ${example}</p>
684:                             </div>
685:                         ` : ''}
686:                         <p class="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">Rate your recall using the buttons below</p>
687:                     </div>
688:                 </div>
689:             `;
690:         }
691:     }
692: 
693:     function renderStudyScreen() {
694:         if (!currentCards.length || currentIndex >= currentCards.length) {
695:             const message = allDueReviewed
696:                 ? `<div class="text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-2">🎉📚</div><h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-blue-800 marker-underline mb-2">All cards viewed!</h2><p class="text-sm md:text-base mb-3">You've seen all due cards for this set.<br>Try another set or come back later!</p>`
697:                 : `<div class="text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-2">🏆✨</div><h2 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-green-800 marker-underline mb-2">All caught up!</h2><p class="text-sm md:text-base mb-3">Great job, ${escapeHtml(currentStudent?.username || currentStudent?.name || 'student')}!</p>`;
698:             appEl.innerHTML = `<div class="whiteboard-card p-4 md:p-8 text-center">${message}<button id="backToWelcomeBtn" class="bg-gray-800 text-white px-4 md:px-6 py-1 md:py-2 text-base md:text-lg rounded-xl btn-chalk">← Back</button></div>`;
699:             document.getElementById('backToWelcomeBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { currentView = 'welcome'; render(); });
700:             return;
701:         }
702: 
703:         currentCardObj = currentCards[currentIndex];
704:         const card = currentCardObj;
705:         const pattern = card.pattern_type || 'usage_cases';
706:         const progressPercent = ((currentIndex + 1) / currentCards.length) * 100;
707: 
708:         let quizState = { selectedIdx: null, userAnswer: '', answered: false, isCorrect: false };
709: 
710:         const html = `
711:             <div class="whiteboard-card p-3 md:p-4">
712:                 <div class="flex justify-between items-center flex-wrap gap-1 mb-2">
713:                     <div class="flex gap-2 items-center">
714:                         <span class="level-chip">${escapeHtml(card.level || 'Beginner')}</span>
715:                         <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">${currentIndex + 1}/${currentCards.length}</span>
716:                     </div>
717:                     <div class="flex gap-2">
718:                         <button id="flipCardBtn" class="flip-btn px-3 py-1 md:px-4 md:py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-xs font-bold">🔄 FLIP</button>
719:                         <button id="exitStudyBtn" class="text-red-600 font-bold bg-red-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs">Exit</button>
720:                     </div>
721:                 </div>
722:                 <div class="progress-bar-container mb-1" data-pct="${Math.round(progressPercent)}%"><div class="progress-bar-fill" style="width: ${progressPercent}%"></div></div>
723:                 <div class="text-center mb-1">
724:                     <span class="text-lg text-gray-600 title-font font-bold">📚 ${escapeHtml(card.set_name || '')}</span>
725:                 </div>
726:                 <div class="flashcard-container relative w-full" style="min-height: ${isMobile ? '340px' : '400px'};">
727:                     <div class="flashcard relative w-full" id="flashcardEl" style="min-height: ${isMobile ? '340px' : '400px'};">
728:                         <div class="card-front p-4 md:p-5 overflow-y-auto border-4 border-gray-700 shadow-xl" id="cardFront">
729:                             ${renderCardFront(card)}
730:                         </div>
731:                         <div class="card-back p-4 md:p-5 overflow-y-auto border-4 border-blue-300 shadow-xl" id="cardBack">
732:                             ${renderCardBack(card, quizState)}
733:                         </div>
734:                     </div>
735:                 </div>
736:                 <div class="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-1 md:gap-2 mt-2">
737:                     <button id="againBtn" class="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-bold btn-chalk">🔁 Again (1d)</button>
738:                     <button id="goodBtn" class="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-bold btn-chalk">👍 Good (3d)</button>
739:                     <button id="easyBtn" class="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white px-3 md:px-4 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-bold btn-chalk">⭐ Easy (7d)</button>
740:                 </div>
741:                 <p class="text-center text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">💡 Tap card or FLIP to flip</p>
742:             </div>
743:         `;
744:         appEl.innerHTML = html;
745: 
746:         const flashcard = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
747: 
748:         function flipHandler() {
749:             if (flashcard.classList.contains('flipped')) {
750:                 flashcard.classList.remove('flipped');
751:                 return;
752:             }
753: 
754:             if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
755:                 const containerId = pattern === 'image_mcq' ? '#mcqOptionsContainer' : '#mcqOptionsContainer';
756:                 const selected = document.querySelector(containerId + ' .quiz-option.selected');
757:                 if (selected) {
758:                     quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
759:                     quizState.answered = true;
760:                     const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
761:                     if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
762:                 }
763:             } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
764:                 const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
765:                 if (input) {
766:                     quizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
767:                     quizState.answered = true;
768:                     const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
769:                     if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
770:                 }
771:             }
772: 
773:             flashcard.classList.add('flipped');
774:         }
775: 
776:         document.getElementById('flipCardBtn')?.addEventListener('click', flipHandler);
777: 
778:         flashcard?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
779:             if (e.target.closest('.quiz-option') || e.target.closest('#gapFillInput') || e.target.closest('audio') || e.target.closest('.btn-chalk')) {
780:                 return;
781:             }
782:             flipHandler();
783:         });
784: 
785:         if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
786:             const options = document.querySelectorAll('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option');
787:             options.forEach(opt => {
788:                 opt.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
789:                     e.stopPropagation();
790:                     options.forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
791:                     opt.classList.add('selected');
792:                     quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(opt.getAttribute('data-idx'));
793:                 });
794:             });
795:         }
796: 
797:         document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => { currentView = 'welcome'; render(); });
798: 
799:         const handleReview = async (quality) => {
800:             let wasCorrect = false;
801:             if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq' || pattern === 'gap_fill' || pattern === 'audio_listening') {
802:                 if (pattern === 'multiple_choice' || pattern === 'image_mcq') {
803:                     const correctIdx = card.content_data?.correct_index || 1;
804:                     wasCorrect = (quizState.selectedIdx === correctIdx);
805:                 } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
806:                     const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || ['answer'];
807:                     wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === quizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase());
808:                 } else if (pattern === 'audio_listening') {
809:                     const correctAnswers = card.content_data?.correct_answers || [];
810:                     if (correctAnswers.length) {
811:                         wasCorrect = correctAnswers.some(ans => ans.toLowerCase() === quizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase());
812:                     } else if (card.content_data?.transcript) {
813:                         wasCorrect = card.content_data.transcript.toLowerCase().trim() === quizState.userAnswer.toLowerCase().trim();
814:                     } else {
815:                         wasCorrect = true;
816:                     }
817:                 }
818:             } else {
819:                 wasCorrect = true;
820:             }
821:             await recordReview(card.id, currentStudent.id, quality, wasCorrect);
822:             currentIndex++;
823:             render();
824:         };
825: 
826:         document.getElementById('againBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(0));
827:         document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(2));
828:         document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => handleReview(3));
829:     }
830: 
831:     loadSavedData();
832:     render();
833: })();

(End of file - total 833 lines)
</content>

1: <?php
2: 
3: class Card
4: {
5:     public static function getBySetAndLevels(
6:         ?int $setId,
7:         array $levels,
8:         bool $randomMode = false,
9:         int $limit = 500,
10:         ?int $excludeUserId = null,
11:         ?array $setIds = null
12:     ): array {
13:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
14:         $sql = "SELECT c.id, c.set_id, c.title, c.pattern_type, c.level, c.question_text, c.content_data, s.name AS set_name FROM cards c LEFT JOIN card_sets s ON c.set_id = s.id WHERE 1=1";
15:         $params = [];
16: 
17:         if (!$randomMode && $setId !== null && $setId > 0) {
18:             $sql .= " AND c.set_id = ?";
19:             $params[] = $setId;
20:         } elseif (!$randomMode && ($setId === null || $setId === 0)) {
21:             $sql .= " AND c.set_id = 1";
22:         }
23: 
24:         if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {
25:             $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
26:             $sql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
27:             foreach ($setIds as $sid) {
28:                 $params[] = (int) $sid;
29:             }
30:         }
31: 
32:         if (!empty($levels)) {
33:             $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($levels), '?'));
34:             $sql .= " AND c.level IN ($placeholders)";
35:             foreach ($levels as $level) {
36:                 $params[] = $level;
37:             }
38:         }
39: 
40:         if ($excludeUserId !== null && $excludeUserId > 0) {
41:             $sql .= " AND c.id NOT IN (SELECT card_id FROM user_card_progress WHERE user_id = ? AND next_review > CURDATE())";
42:             $params[] = $excludeUserId;
43:         }
44: 
45:         $sql .= " ORDER BY c.id ASC LIMIT " . (int) $limit;
46: 
47:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
48:         $stmt->execute($params);
49:         $cards = $stmt->fetchAll();
50: 
51:         foreach ($cards as &$card) {
52:             if (!empty($card['content_data'])) {
53:                 $decoded = json_decode($card['content_data'], true);
54:                 $card['content_data'] = $decoded ?: [];
55:             } else {
56:                 $card['content_data'] = [];
57:             }
58:         }
59: 
60:         return $cards;
61:     }
62: 
63:     public static function getBySet(int $setId): array
64:     {
65:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
66:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT id, set_id, title, pattern_type, level, question_text, content_data FROM cards WHERE set_id = ? ORDER BY id");
67:         $stmt->execute([$setId]);
68:         return $stmt->fetchAll();
69:     }
70: 
71:     public static function getById(int $id): ?array
72:     {
73:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
74:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT * FROM cards WHERE id = ?");
75:         $stmt->execute([$id]);
76:         $row = $stmt->fetch();
77:         return $row ?: null;
78:     }
79: 
80:     public static function save(array $data): int
81:     {
82:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
83:         $id = (int) ($data['id'] ?? 0);
84:         $setId = (int) ($data['set_id'] ?? 1);
85:         $title = $data['title'] ?? '';
86:         $patternType = $data['pattern_type'] ?? 'usage_cases';
87:         $level = $data['level'] ?? 'Beginner';
88:         $questionText = $data['question_text'] ?? '';
89:         $contentData = json_encode($data['content_data'] ?? []);
90: 
91:         self::ensurePatternTypeEnum($patternType);
92: 
93:         if ($id > 0) {
94:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("UPDATE cards SET set_id=?, title=?, pattern_type=?, level=?, question_text=?, content_data=? WHERE id=?");
95:             $stmt->execute([$setId, $title, $patternType, $level, $questionText, $contentData, $id]);
96:             return $id;
97:         } else {
98:             $stmt = $pdo->prepare("INSERT INTO cards (set_id, title, pattern_type, level, question_text, content_data) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)");
99:             $stmt->execute([$setId, $title, $patternType, $level, $questionText, $contentData]);
100:             return (int) $pdo->lastInsertId();
101:         }
102:     }
103: 
104:     public static function delete(int $id): void
105:     {
106:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
107:         $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM cards WHERE id = ?");
108:         $stmt->execute([$id]);
109:     }
110: 
111:     private static function ensurePatternTypeEnum(string $type): void
112:     {
113:         $known = ['usage_cases','deep_dive','formula_table','multiple_choice','gap_fill','image_description','audio_listening','image_mcq'];
114:         if (!in_array($type, $known)) return;
115: 
116:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
117:         $col = $pdo->query("SHOW COLUMNS FROM cards WHERE Field = 'pattern_type'")->fetch();
118:         if (!$col) return;
119: 
120:         $enum = $col['Type'];
121:         if (strpos($enum, $type) !== false) return;
122: 
123:         $escaped = array_map(fn($v) => "'" . str_replace("'", "''", $v) . "'", $known);
124:         $pdo->exec("ALTER TABLE cards MODIFY pattern_type ENUM(" . implode(',', $escaped) . ") DEFAULT 'usage_cases'");
125:     }
126: 
127:     public static function fixTruncatedPatternTypes(): array
128:     {
129:         $pdo = Database::getConnection();
130:         $stmt = $pdo->query("SELECT id, pattern_type, title, content_data FROM cards WHERE pattern_type IS NULL OR pattern_type = ''");
131:         $broken = $stmt->fetchAll();
132:         $fixed = [];
133: 
134:         foreach ($broken as $card) {
135:             $data = json_decode($card['content_data'], true) ?: [];
136:             $guessed = self::guessPatternType($data, $card['title'] ?? '');
137:             if ($guessed) {
138:                 $pdo->prepare("UPDATE cards SET pattern_type = ? WHERE id = ?")
139:                     ->execute([$guessed, (int) $card['id']]);
140:                 self::ensurePatternTypeEnum($guessed);
141:                 $fixed[] = ['id' => (int) $card['id'], 'title' => $card['title'], 'set_type' => $guessed];
142:             }
143:         }
144:         return $fixed;
145:     }
146: 
147:     private static function guessPatternType(array $data, string $title): ?string
148:     {
149:         $hasImage = !empty($data['image_url']);
150:         $hasAudio = !empty($data['audio_url']);
151:         $hasOptions = isset($data['options']) && is_array($data['options']);
152:         $hasCorrectIndex = isset($data['correct_index']);
153:         $hasSentence = !empty($data['sentence']);
154:         $hasDescription = !empty($data['description']);
155:         $hasPrompt = !empty($data['prompt']);
156:         $hasCorrectAnswers = !empty($data['correct_answers']);
157: 
158:         if ($hasImage && $hasOptions) return 'image_mcq';
159:         if ($hasImage && $hasDescription) return 'image_description';
160:         if ($hasAudio && ($hasPrompt || $hasCorrectAnswers)) return 'audio_listening';
161:         if ($hasOptions && $hasCorrectIndex) return 'multiple_choice';
162:         if ($hasSentence && $hasCorrectAnswers) return 'gap_fill';
163: 
164:         return null;
165:     }
166: }

(End of file - total 166 lines)
</content>
```

Layer 1: Gets explicit assignments from `student_set_access`. If empty, returns ALL sets.

So the logic is:
- If a set has `exclusive_to` = "alice,bob" and user is "charlie", the set is removed. That's correct.
- If a set has `exclusive_to` = "alice,bob" and user is "alice", the set stays. That's correct.

Set 3 would NOT be returned because it's not in the Layer 1 result, and `exclusive_to` is only used for subtraction, not addition. public static function getAccessibleSets(int $userId, string $username = ''): array
{
    // Layer 1: from student_set_access
    $allowed = array_map('intval', $allowed);  // from DB
    
    // Admin context: return only explicit assignments (may be empty)

        return $allowed;

    // ...

}
```

Look at `getAccessibleSets()` in `src/Review.php` lines 133-144:

```php
// Layer 2: set → users (exclusive_to). Remove sets where user isn't listed.
$stmt = $pdo->query("SELECT id, exclusive_to FROM card_sets WHERE exclusive_to IS NOT NULL AND exclusive_to != ''");
$exclusiveSets = $stmt->fetchAll();
foreach ($exclusiveSets as $set) {
    $setId = (int) $set['id'];
    if (in_array($setId, $allowed)) {
        $usernames = array_map('trim', explode(',', $set['exclusive_to']));
        if (!in_array($username, $usernames)) {
            $allowed = array_values(array_filter($allowed, fn($id) => $id !== $setId));
        }
    }
}
```

The `exclusive_to` is split by comma and trimmed. The usernames are compared with `in_array($username, $usernames)`. 

If `exclusive_to` contains usernames separated by commas (e.g., "alice, bob"), this should work. But what if `exclusive_to` has a different format? Or what if the stored usernames have extra spaces that aren't properly trimmed? The `array_map('trim', ...)` handles that.

**But also:** What if there are NO sets with `exclusive_to`? Then the `getAccessibleSets()` function returns all sets or the assigned sets without any filtering. The `exclusive_to` filtering only applies to sets that have that column set.

If the admin only uses `student_set_access` to restrict access (without using `exclusive_to`), then `getAccessibleSets()` should return only the assigned sets. And then `accessible_set_ids` on the client would be that list. And random mode would filter by those IDs. This should work.

Then:
```php
$cards = Card::getBySetAndLevels($setId, $selectedLevels, $randomMode, 500, $studentId, !empty($setIds) ? $setIds : null);
```

Same logic inside `Card::getBySetAndLevels()`:
```php
if (!$randomMode && $setId !== null && $setId > 0) {
    // specific set
} elseif (!$randomMode && ($setId === null || $setId === 0)) {
    // default to set 1
}
if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {
    // filter by set IDs
}
```

If random mode but no set IDs: NO SET FILTERING. Returns cards from ALL sets.

**So the question remains: when would `setIds` be empty when random mode is used?**

From the JS code, `setIds` comes from `body.set_ids`, which is set to `restrictedSets` (from `currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids`).

The `accessible_set_ids` is set in `index.php` from `Review::getAccessibleSets()`. This should always return an array (possibly empty).

**Let me consider: what if the student data doesn't have `accessible_set_ids`?**

In `index.php`:
```php
$studentData['accessible_set_ids'] = Review::getAccessibleSets((int) $studentData['id'], $studentData['username'] ?? '');
```

This will always set it. So `currentStudent.accessible_set_ids` will always be defined.

**But what if `getAccessibleSets` returns an empty array for a student?** Let me trace through that:

- Layer 1: `student_set_access` has some entries → `$allowed` is non-empty
- Student context: skip "all sets" fallback
- Layer 2: ALL sets in `$allowed` have `exclusive_to` that EXCLUDES this user → all removed
- Result: `[]`

Then in JS:
```javascript
const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;  // []
if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {  // [] && false → false
    body.set_ids = restrictedSets;  // NOT executed
}
```

`body.set_ids` remains undefined. In PHP, `$setIds` will be `[]` (from `$input['set_ids']` which is not set, or from the fallback parsing which gives `[]`).

Actually, let me check: in `get_cards.php`:
```php
$setIds = isset($input['set_ids']) ? (array) $input['set_ids'] : [];
```

If `body.set_ids` is not sent, `$input['set_ids']` won't exist, so `$setIds` defaults to `[]`.

Then:
```php
if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {  // !empty([]) === false
    // skipped
}
```

No set filtering! ALL cards are returned.

**So the bug is: when `accessible_set_ids` is an empty array, the client-side code doesn't send any `set_ids`, which causes the server to return ALL cards.**

But the more common scenario might be: what if `accessible_set_ids` is never set because `currentStudent` doesn't have it?

Actually wait, I just realized - looking at the login response in `login.php`:

```php
$user = User::authenticate($name, $password);
// ...
echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'student' => $user, 'new' => false]);
```

The `User::authenticate()` returns the user data from the database, which includes id, username, full_name, is_admin, progress, english_level. It does NOT include `accessible_set_ids`.

Then in `app.js`:
```javascript
async function loginOrRegister(name, password, action, fullName = '', englishLevel = 'Beginner') {
    const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', { name, password, action, full_name: fullName, english_level: englishLevel });
    if (res && res.success && res.student) {
        currentStudent = res.student;
        currentView = 'welcome';
        render();
        return res.student;
    }
    return null;
}
```

When the user logs in via the AJAX API, the `currentStudent` is set to the response student data, which does NOT include `accessible_set_ids`. The `accessible_set_ids` is ONLY added when `index.php` renders the page with `FLASHCARD_DATA`.

But then `loadSavedData()` is called:
```javascript
function loadSavedData() {
    if (loggedInStudent && loggedInStudent.id) {
        currentStudent = loggedInStudent;
        currentView = 'welcome';
    }
    ...
}
```

So on page load, `currentStudent` is set from `FLASHCARD_DATA.loggedInStudent`, which includes `accessible_set_ids`. Good.

But what if the page is loaded without a logged-in student (session expired/not logged in)? Then the login screen is shown, and the user logs in via AJAX. At that point, `currentStudent` is the response from `login.php`, which does NOT include `accessible_set_ids`.

Then when they click "START STUDYING" in random mode:
```javascript
const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;  // undefined!
```

`restrictedSets` is `undefined`, so `body.set_ids` is never set. The server receives no `set_ids`, and random mode returns ALL cards.

**THIS IS THE BUG!**

When the user logs in via the AJAX API (without a full page reload), the `currentStudent` object doesn't have `accessible_set_ids` because it's only set by `index.php` during the initial page render (via `FLASHCARD_DATA`).

The `login.php` endpoint should also include `accessible_set_ids` in the response, or the client should fetch it separately.

Let me verify this theory by looking at the flow:

1. User visits `index.php` for the first time, not logged in → login screen shown.
2. User logs in via AJAX `POST api/login.php` → response has student data WITHOUT `accessible_set_ids`.
3. `currentStudent` is set to this response data.
4. User selects random mode and clicks START.
5. `currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids` is `undefined`.
6. `body.set_ids` is not set.
7. Server returns ALL cards without any set filtering.

This is the bug!

But wait, there's also the fallback in `loadSavedData()`:
```javascript
function loadSavedData() {
    if (loggedInStudent && loggedInStudent.id) {
        currentStudent = loggedInStudent;
        ...
    }
}
```

If the user came from a page load (not AJAX login), `loggedInStudent` is `FLASHCARD_DATA.loggedInStudent` which DOES have `accessible_set_ids`. So this only affects users who log in via the AJAX mechanism without a subsequent page load.

Actually, I realize there might be yet another issue. Let me also check if the initial page load flow works:

1. User visits `index.php`, already has a session → `loggedInStudent` is set from session.
2. `index.php` fetches fresh user data and adds `accessible_set_ids`.
3. `FLASHCARD_DATA.loggedInStudent` includes `accessible_set_ids`.
4. JS sets `currentStudent = loggedInStudent` which has `accessible_set_ids`.
5. Random mode works correctly.

And the AJAX login flow:
1. User visits `index.php`, not logged in.
2. User logs in via AJAX → `currentStudent` set but WITHOUT `accessible_set_ids`.
3. BUT, the JS also doesn't do a full page reload (it just re-renders the welcome screen via `render()`).
4. Random mode fails because `accessible_set_ids` is undefined.

So the fix would be either:
a. Include `accessible_set_ids` in the login API response.
b. Have the client fetch the accessible set IDs after login.
c. Do a full page reload after login (but that's a bad UX).

Let me now also check if there are other issues... Actually, there's ONE MORE subtle issue I noticed.

In `loadCardsFromAPI`:
```javascript
if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
    const filtered = phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id);
    const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;
    if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
        body.set_ids = restrictedSets;
    }
}
```

`phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id)` - what does this do? It filters the card sets array to only include sets where `s.id` is truthy. Since all sets should have a numeric ID, this effectively returns all sets. The result is stored in `filtered` but never used.

This line seems like dead code. The developer might have intended to use `filtered` as the restricted sets, but then changed to `restrictedSets` from `currentStudent`. Or perhaps they meant to intersect `filtered` with `restrictedSets`.

OK now let me compile my findings. I have a clear picture of the bug.

Actually, let me also consider one more scenario. The `loadCardSetsFromAPI` function fetches sets from the API:

```javascript
async function loadCardSetsFromAPI() {
    const res = await apiCall('api/get_sets.php?user_id=' + (currentStudent?.id || 0) + '&username=' + encodeURIComponent(currentStudent?.username || ''), 'GET');
    if (res && res.success && res.sets && res.sets.length > 0) {
        availableCardSets = res.sets;
        return availableCardSets;
    }
    // ...
}
```

This fetches the sets that are accessible to the current student. It properly calls `getAccessibleSets()` on the server side. So `availableCardSets` (which is used in the select dropdown) should only contain accessible sets.

But in random mode, the `set_ids` for filtering are obtained from `currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids`, not from `availableCardSets`. If `accessible_set_ids` is undefined (AJAX login case), the filter is bypassed.

Actually, even if `accessible_set_ids` is defined and correct, there's another potential issue: `availableCardSets` may differ from `accessible_set_ids` in terms of which sets are included. But I think they should be consistent since both ultimately rely on `getAccessibleSets()`.

Let me summarize my complete findings.

Now I have a complete picture. Here is my comprehensive analysis of how random mode works and why it bypasses per-user set restrictions.

---

## Complete Analysis of the Random Mode Bug

### 1. Overview of the Random Mode Data Flow

There are **two related bugs** that cause random mode to ignore per-user set restrictions:

- **Bug A**: After an AJAX-based login, `currentStudent` lacks the `accessible_set_ids` property, causing the client to send no set filter, so the server returns ALL cards.
- **Bug B**: Even if `accessible_set_ids` is present, if `getAccessibleSets()` returns an **empty array**, the client-side condition `restrictedSets.length > 0` is false, so again no set filter is sent, returning ALL cards.

---

### 2. Where `accessible_set_ids` Is Set

**Only in `index.php` (lines 78-84):**

```php
$studentData['accessible_set_ids'] = Review::getAccessibleSets(
    (int) $studentData['id'], 
    $studentData['username'] ?? ''
);
```

This is embedded in the initial page render as part of `window.FLASHCARD_DATA.loggedInStudent`.

---

### 3. Bug A: AJAX Login Omits `accessible_set_ids`

**`api/login.php` (line 77)** returns student data from `User::authenticate()`:
```php
echo json_encode(['success' => true, 'student' => $user, 'new' => false]);
```

The `User::authenticate()` method (**`src/User.php` lines 33-50**) returns:
```php
['id', 'username', 'full_name', 'password_hash', 'is_admin', 'progress', 'english_level']
```

It **does not** include `accessible_set_ids`.

**`assets/js/app.js` (lines 104-113)** - the login handler:
```javascript
async function loginOrRegister(name, password, action, fullName = '', englishLevel = 'Beginner') {
    const res = await apiCall('api/login.php', 'POST', { ... });
    if (res && res.success && res.student) {
        currentStudent = res.student;  // No accessible_set_ids!
        currentView = 'welcome';
        render();
        return res.student;
    }
}
```

When a user logs in via the AJAX API (without a full page reload), `currentStudent` is assigned the raw login response, which **lacks** `accessible_set_ids`.

---

### 4. How the Missing Property Causes the Bypass

**`assets/js/app.js` (lines 76-102)** - the critical function:

```javascript
async function loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levels, studentId, randomMode = false, studentLevel = '') {
    ...
    const body = {
        set_id: (randomMode || setId === null) ? '' : setId.toString(),
        student_id: studentId,
        levels: levels,
        random_mode: randomMode ? 'true' : 'false',
        student_level: studentLevel,
        due_only: dueOnlyMode
    };
    if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
        const filtered = phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id);        // ← DEAD CODE, result never used
        const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;  // ← undefined after AJAX login!
        if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
            body.set_ids = restrictedSets;   // ← NEVER REACHED if undefined/null/empty
        }
        // If restrictedSets is undefined/null/[], body.set_ids is NEVER SET
    }
    ...
}
```

When `currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids` is `undefined`:
- `restrictedSets` is `undefined`
- `restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0` evaluates to `false`
- `body.set_ids` is **never assigned**

---

### 5. What Happens Server-Side Without `set_ids`

**`api/get_cards.php` (lines 80-87)**:
```php
if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {   // !empty([]) === false
    $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
    $countSql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
    ...
}
```

**`src/Card.php` (lines 24-30)**:
```php
if ($randomMode && !empty($setIds)) {   // !empty([]) === false
    $placeholders = implode(',', array_fill(0, count($setIds), '?'));
    $sql .= " AND c.set_id IN ($placeholders)";
    ...
}
```

When `$setIds` is an empty array, `!empty($setIds)` is `false`, so **no `WHERE set_id IN (...)` clause is added**. The query returns cards from ALL sets, completely bypassing any per-user restrictions.

---

### 6. Bug B: Empty Array from `getAccessibleSets()`

**`src/Review.php` (lines 110-147)**:

```php
public static function getAccessibleSets(int $userId, string $username = ''): array
{
    // Layer 1: explicit assignments from student_set_access
    $allowed = ...;  // from student_set_access table

    // Admin context: return only explicit assignments
    if ($username === '') {
        return $allowed;  // may be empty []
    }

    // Student context: empty = ALL sets
    if (empty($allowed)) {
        $stmt = $pdo->query("SELECT id FROM card_sets");
        $allowed = array_map('intval', $stmt->fetchAll(\PDO::FETCH_COLUMN));
    }

    // Layer 2: exclusive_to filtering (REMOVES only, never ADDS)
    foreach ($exclusiveSets as $set) {
        if (in_array($setId, $allowed)) {
            $usernames = array_map('trim', explode(',', $set['exclusive_to']));
            if (!in_array($username, $usernames)) {
                $allowed = array_values(array_filter($allowed, fn($id) => $id !== $setId));
            }
        }
    }
    return $allowed;
}
```

**Problematic scenario**: If a user has entries in `student_set_access` AND **all** of those sets have their `exclusive_to` column set to exclude this user, then:
1. Layer 1 returns a non-empty `$allowed` (e.g., `[1, 2]`)
2. The "empty = all sets" fallback is skipped (because `$allowed` is non-empty)
3. Layer 2 removes all sets → `$allowed` becomes `[]`
4. Result: `getAccessibleSets()` returns `[]`

Then in the JS:
```javascript
const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;  // []
if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {  // false
    body.set_ids = restrictedSets;  // not executed
}
```

Again, `body.set_ids` is never set, and the server returns all cards.

Additionally, there is a **design issue**: `exclusive_to` is only used for **removal**, never for **inclusion**. If a set has `exclusive_to` containing the user's username, but the set is NOT in `student_set_access`, the user won't have access to it. The system has two parallel restriction mechanisms that don't interact correctly.

---

### 7. Dead Code in `loadCardsFromAPI`

**`assets/js/app.js` lines 87-93**:
```javascript
if (randomMode && phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
    const filtered = phpCardSets.filter(s => s.id);  // ← assigned but NEVER USED
    const restrictedSets = currentStudent?.accessible_set_ids;
    if (restrictedSets && restrictedSets.length > 0) {
        body.set_ids = restrictedSets;
    }
}
```

The variable `filtered` is computed but never referenced. This appears to be leftover debugging or abandoned refactoring code.

---

### 8. Summary of All Relevant Files and Methods

| File | Lines | What It Does |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `src/Review.php` | 110-147 | `getAccessibleSets()` - core access check; combines `student_set_access` + `exclusive_to` filtering |
| `src/Review.php` | 149-158 | `setAccessibleSets()` - admin assigns sets to users |
| `src/Card.php` | 5-61 | `getBySetAndLevels()` - main card query; skips set filter when `$setIds` is empty in random mode |
| `api/get_cards.php` | 1-137 | API endpoint; reads `random_mode` and `set_ids`; if `set_ids` empty in random mode, no set filtering |
| `api/login.php` | 1-81 | Login/register endpoint; does NOT return `accessible_set_ids` |
| `api/get_sets.php` | 1-41 | Returns sets; correctly applies `getAccessibleSets()` filter |
| `index.php` | 75-86 | Sets `FLASHCARD_DATA` with `accessible_set_ids` (only on initial page render) |
| `assets/js/app.js` | 76-102 | `loadCardsFromAPI()` - client-side; only sends `set_ids` if `accessible_set_ids` is non-empty |
| `assets/js/app.js` | 104-113 | `loginOrRegister()` - sets `currentStudent` from AJAX login response (missing `accessible_set_ids`) |

---

### 9. Root Cause Summary

The primary bug is **Bug A**: When a user logs in via the AJAX API (`api/login.php`), the student data returned does **not** include `accessible_set_ids`. The property is only set by `index.php` during the initial server-side page render. Since the AJAX login performs a client-side re-render (not a page reload), `currentStudent` permanently lacks `accessible_set_ids`. This causes `loadCardsFromAPI()` to omit the `set_ids` parameter in random mode requests, which causes `api/get_cards.php` to return cards from ALL sets without any restriction.

**The fix requires** either:
1. Adding `accessible_set_ids` to the login API response in `api/login.php`, or
2. Having the client fetch accessible sets from `api/get_sets.php` after login and populate `body.set_ids` from the result, or
3. Doing a full page redirect after AJAX login to re-initialize `FLASHCARD_DATA` from `index.php` (e.g., `window.location.reload()` after login).

*[step-finish part]*

+        const title = (card.title || '').toLowerCase();
+        const content = card.content_data || {};
+
+        if (title.includes('past') || title.includes('simple past')) {
+            return '📝 Use Simple Past tense';
+        } else if (title.includes('present perfect')) {
+            return '📝 Use Present Perfect (have/has + past participle)';
+        } else if (title.includes('modal') || title.includes('can') || title.includes('could') || title.includes('should') || title.includes('must')) {
+            return '📝 Use a modal verb (can, could, should, must, might, etc.)';
+        } else if (title.includes('future') || title.includes('will')) {
+            return '📝 Use Future (will + base verb)';
+        } else if (title.includes('continuous') || title.includes('progressive')) {
+            return '📝 Use Continuous form (am/is/are/was/were + verb-ing)';
+        } else if (title.includes('passive')) {
+            return '📝 Use Passive voice (be + past participle)';
+        } else if (title.includes('conditional')) {
+            return '📝 Use Conditional (would/could/might + base verb)';
+        } else if (content.sentence) {
+            if (content.sentence.includes('yesterday') || content.sentence.includes('last week') || content.sentence.includes('ago')) {
+                return '📝 Hint: This happened in the past → use Simple Past';
+            } else if (content.sentence.includes('tomorrow') || content.sentence.includes('next week')) {
+                return '📝 Hint: This will happen in the future → use Future (will)';
+            } else if (content.sentence.includes('every day') || content.sentence.includes('usually') || content.sentence.includes('always')) {
+                return '📝 Hint: This is a habit/routine → use Simple Present';
+            } else if (content.sentence.includes('now') || content.sentence.includes('right now')) {
+                return '📝 Hint: This is happening now → use Present Continuous';
+            }
+        }
+        return '📝 Type the correct form of the verb in parentheses';
+    }

+(function () {
+    const isMobile = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent) || window.innerWidth < 768;
+
+    let currentView = 'welcome';
+    let currentStudent = null;
+    let currentSet = null;
+    let selectedLevels = [];
+    let currentCards = [];
+    let currentIndex = 0;
+    let currentCardObj = null;
+    let availableCardSets = [];
+    let isRandomMode = false;
+
+    const STUDENT_STORAGE_KEY = 'flashcard_student';
+    const SESSION_STATE_KEY = 'flashcard_session';
+    const PROGRESS_STORAGE_KEY = 'flashcard_progress';
+    let localProgress = {};
+
+    const phpCardSets = window.FLASHCARD_DATA.cardSets;
+    const dbConnected = window.FLASHCARD_DATA.dbConnected;
+
+    function loadSavedData() {
+        const saved = localStorage.getItem(STUDENT_STORAGE_KEY);
+        if (saved) try { currentStudent = JSON.parse(saved); } catch (e) {}
+        const session = sessionStorage.getItem(SESSION_STATE_KEY);
+        if (session) try { const s = JSON.parse(session);
+            if (s.selectedLevels) selectedLevels = s.selectedLevels;
+            if (s.currentSet) currentSet = s.currentSet;
+            if (s.isRandomMode) isRandomMode = s.isRandomMode;
+        } catch (e) {}
+        const prog = localStorage.getItem(PROGRESS_STORAGE_KEY);
+        if (prog) try { localProgress = JSON.parse(prog); } catch (e) {}
+    }
+
+    function saveStudent(student) { if (student?.id) localStorage.setItem(STUDENT_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(student)); }
+    function saveSessionState() {
+        sessionStorage.setItem(SESSION_STATE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ selectedLevels, currentSet, isRandomMode }));
+    }
+
+    function saveProgress(cardId, quality, wasCorrect) {
+        const key = `${currentStudent?.id}_${cardId}`;
+        let nextReview = quality === 0 ? Date.now() + 86400000 : (quality === 2 ? Date.now() + 259200000 : Date.now() + 604800000);
+        localProgress[key] = { quality, timestamp: Date.now(), nextReview, wasCorrect: wasCorrect !== false };
+        localStorage.setItem(PROGRESS_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(localProgress));
+    }
+
+    function isCardDue(cardId) {
+        const key = `${currentStudent?.id}_${cardId}`;
+        const record = localProgress[key];
+        if (!record) return true;
+        return Date.now() >= record.nextReview;
+    }
+
+    function clearStudent() { localStorage.removeItem(STUDENT_STORAGE_KEY); currentStudent = null; renderWelcomeScreen(); }
+
+    async function apiCall(endpoint, method = 'GET', data = null) {
+        try {
+            let url = endpoint;
+            let options = { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }, credentials: 'same-origin' };
+            if (data && method === 'POST') {
+                const formData = new URLSearchParams();
+                for (const key in data) {
+                    if (data.hasOwnProperty(key) && data[key] !== undefined && data[key] !== null && data[key] !== '') {
+                        formData.append(key, data[key]);
+                    }
+                }
+                options.body = formData.toString();
+            }
+            const response = await fetch(url, options);
+            const text = await response.text();
+            if (!text || text.trim() === '') return null;
+            try { return JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return null; }
+        } catch (err) { return null; }
+    }
+
+    async function loadCardSetsFromAPI() {
+        try {
+            const res = await apiCall('api/get_sets.php', 'GET');
+            if (res && res.success && res.sets && res.sets.length > 0) {
+                const setsWithCards = res.sets.filter(set => {
+                    return phpCardSets.some(phpSet => phpSet.id === set.id);
+                });
+                if (setsWithCards.length > 0) {
+                    availableCardSets = setsWithCards;
+                    return availableCardSets;
+                }
+            }
+        } catch (e) {}
+        if (phpCardSets && phpCardSets.length > 0) {
+            availableCardSets = phpCardSets;
+            return availableCardSets;
+        }
+        availableCardSets = [{ id: 1, name: 'English: Present Simple' }];
+        return availableCardSets;
+    }
+
+    async function loadCardsFromAPI(setId, levels, studentId, randomMode = false) {
+        try {
+            const res = await apiCall('api/get_cards.php', 'POST', {
+                set_id: (randomMode || setId === null) ? '' : setId.toString(),
+                student_id: studentId,
+                levels: JSON.stringify(levels),
+                random_mode: randomMode ? 'true' : 'false'
+            });
+            if (res && res.success && res.cards && res.cards.length > 0) return res.cards;
+        } catch (e) {}
+        return [];
+    }
+
+    async function createOrGetStudent(name) {
+        try {
+            const res = await apiCall('api/create_student.php', 'POST', { name });
+            if (res && res.success && res.student) { saveStudent(res.student); return res.student; }
+        } catch (e) {}
+        const mockStudent = { id: Date.now(), name: name };
+        saveStudent(mockStudent);
+        return mockStudent;
+    }
+
+    async function recordReview(cardId, studentId, quality, wasCorrect) {
+        try { await apiCall('api/record_review.php', 'POST', { card_id: cardId, student_id: studentId, quality, correct: wasCorrect }); } catch (e) {}
+        saveProgress(cardId, quality, wasCorrect);
+        return true;
+    }
+
+    let statusTimeout;
+    function displayStatusMessage(message, type = 'info') {
+        const existing = document.getElementById('statusMessage');
+        if (existing) existing.remove();
+        const colors = { success: '#16a34a', error: '#dc2626', warning: '#d97706', info: '#2563eb' };
+        const div = document.createElement('div');
+        div.id = 'statusMessage';
+        div.style.cssText = `position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; background: ${colors[type]}; color: white; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; z-index: 1000;`;
+        div.innerHTML = message;
+        document.body.appendChild(div);
+        if (statusTimeout) clearTimeout(statusTimeout);
+        statusTimeout = setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 3000);
+    }
+
+    const appEl = document.getElementById('appRoot');
+
+    function render() {
+        if (currentView === 'welcome') renderWelcomeScreen();
+        else renderStudyScreen();
+    }
+

+

+                    <h1 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl text-blue-900 marker-underline">Flashcard Studio</h1>
+                    <p class="text-gray-600 text-base md:text-xl mt-2">spaced repetition · tap card to flip</p>

+                <div class="space-y-5 md:space-y-7">
