```
+                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2 flex-wrap gap-2">
+                            <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 title-font">👤 Your Name</label>
+                            ${currentStudent ? `<span class="student-badge">✅ ${escapeHtml(currentStudent.name)}</span>` : ''}
+                        </div>
+                        <input type="text" id="studentNameInput" placeholder="Enter your name" class="w-full p-2 md:p-3 text-lg md:text-xl border-2 rounded-xl" value="${currentStudent?.name || ''}">
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
+                        <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2 title-font">📖 Card Set</label>
+                        <select id="setSelect" class="w-full p-2 md:p-3 text-base md:text-lg border-2 rounded-xl bg-white">${setsHtml}</select>
+                        <button id="refreshSetsBtn" class="mt-2 text-xs text-blue-600 underline">⟳ Refresh (show non-empty sets)</button>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="marker-border p-4 md:p-5 bg-white/80">
+                        <label class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 title-font">🎯 Difficulty Levels</label>

+                            `).join('')}
+                        </div>
+                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">💡 Select levels, then click START to filter cards</p>
+                    </div>
+                    <button id="launchStudyBtn" class="w-full bg-blue-700 text-white py-3 md:py-4 text-xl md:text-2xl title-font rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] hover:translate-y-1 transition-all">🚀 START STUDYING →</button>
+                    ${currentStudent ? `<button id="switchStudentBtn" class="w-full text-gray-500 py-2 text-xs md:text-sm underline">↺ Switch student</button>` : ''}

+                saveSessionState();

+        });
+

+                    freshSets.map(s => `<option value="${s.id}" ${currentSet?.id == s.id && !randomSelectedNow ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 ${escapeHtml(s.name)}</option>`).join('');

+

+    function escapeHtml(str) {
+        if (!str) return '';
+        return String(str).replace(/[&<>]/g, m => m === '&' ? '&amp;' : (m === '<' ? '&lt;' : '&gt;'));
+    }
```

```
+    function formatBreaks(text) {
+        if (!text) return '';
+        return String(text).replace(/\\br/g, '<br>').replace(/\\br /g, '<br>');
+    }
+
+    const SoundFX = {
+        _ctx: null,
+        _getCtx() {
+            if (!this._ctx) {
+                try { this._ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } catch (e) {}
+            }
+            return this._ctx;
+        },
+        _play(freq, duration, type, vol) {
+            const ctx = this._getCtx();
+            if (!ctx) return;
+            const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
+            const gain = ctx.createGain();
+            osc.type = type || 'sine';
+            osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime);
+            gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol || 0.15, ctx.currentTime);
+            gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + duration);
+            osc.connect(gain);
+            gain.connect(ctx.destination);
+            osc.start(ctx.currentTime);
+            osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + duration);
+        },
+        correct() {
+            this._play(523.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12);
+            setTimeout(() => this._play(659.25, 0.15, 'sine', 0.12), 100);
+            setTimeout(() => this._play(783.99, 0.25, 'sine', 0.12), 200);
+        },
+        incorrect() {
+            this._play(311.13, 0.2, 'sawtooth', 0.08);
+            setTimeout(() => this._play(233.08, 0.35, 'sawtooth', 0.08), 150);
+        },
+        flip() {
+            this._play(800, 0.08, 'sine', 0.05);
+        },
+        complete() {
+            const notes = [523.25, 587.33, 659.25, 783.99, 880, 1046.5];
+            notes.forEach((n, i) => setTimeout(() => this._play(n, 0.2, 'sine', 0.1), i * 100));
+        },
+        click() { this._play(600, 0.04, 'sine', 0.04); }
+    };
+

+    function handleFlip(card, quizState, flashcardEl) {
+        if (flashcardEl.classList.contains('flipped')) return;
+
+        const pattern = card.pattern_type;
+        if (pattern === 'multiple_choice') {
+            const selected = document.querySelector('#mcqOptionsContainer .quiz-option.selected');
+            if (selected) {
+                quizState.selectedIdx = parseInt(selected.getAttribute('data-idx'));
+                quizState.answered = true;
+            }
+        } else if (pattern === 'gap_fill') {
+            const input = document.getElementById('gapFillInput');
+            if (input) {
+                quizState.userAnswer = input.value.trim();
+                quizState.answered = true;
+            }
+        }
+
+        SoundFX.flip();
+        isFlipped = true;
+
+        const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
+        if (backDiv && quizState.answered) {
+            backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
+        } else if (backDiv && !quizState.answered && pattern !== 'usage_cases' && pattern !== 'deep_dive' && pattern !== 'formula_table') {
+            backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
+        }
+
+        flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
+    }
+
+    function handleAutoFlip(card, quizState) {
+        setTimeout(() => {
+            if (!isFlipped) {
+                SoundFX.flip();
+                isFlipped = true;
+                const flashcardEl = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
+                if (flashcardEl) {
+                    const backDiv = document.getElementById('cardBack');
+                    if (backDiv) backDiv.innerHTML = renderCardBack(card, quizState);
+                    flashcardEl.classList.add('flipped');
+                }
+            }
+        }, 400);
+    }
+
```

This is the root cause. The `04cabbd` commit branched off from a version before `58da15d` (the full makeover), and subsequent commits (`13f9855`, `9ff12f9`, `b5ffe46`, `d65c923`) were built on top of it. Because of this, the post-makeover features were lost.

Now I have the full picture. Here is my complete analysis:

---

## Findings in `/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/assets/js/app.js`

### 1. Keyboard Event Handler (Space/1/2/3) -- MISSING

**The keyboard handler does NOT exist in the current file.** The only `keydown` listener in app.js is for the Enter key on the login password input at **lines 185-186**:

```js
// Line 185-186
document.getElementById('authPasswordInput').addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') document.getElementById('loginBtn').click();
});
```

**What was removed:** A "Global keyboard shortcuts" block that looked like this (was in commit `58da15d` but got lost):

```js
// Global keyboard shortcuts
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || e.target.tagName === 'SELECT') return;
    if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey || e.altKey) return;

    if (currentView === 'study') {
        switch (e.key) {
            case ' ':       // Space -> flip card
                e.preventDefault();
                const flipBtn = document.getElementById('flipCardBtn');
                if (flipBtn) {
                    flipBtn.click();
                } else if (!document.getElementById('flashcardEl')?.classList.contains('flipped')) {
                    const el = document.getElementById('flashcardEl');
                    if (el && currentCardObj) handleFlip(currentCardObj, currentQuizState, el);
                }
                break;
            case '1':       // 1 -> Again (1d)
                document.getElementById('againBtn')?.click();
                break;
            case '2':       // 2 -> Good (3d)
                document.getElementById('goodBtn')?.click();
                break;
            case '3':       // 3 -> Easy (7d)
                document.getElementById('easyBtn')?.click();
                break;
            case 'Escape':
                document.getElementById('exitStudyBtn')?.click();
                break;
        }
    } else if (currentView === 'welcome') {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
            document.getElementById('launchStudyBtn')?.click();
        }
    }
});
```

The keyboard hint labels inside the rating buttons (`<span class="kb-hint">1</span>`, `<span class="kb-hint">2</span>`, `<span class="kb-hint">3</span>` and the `kb-hint` span saying `space` in the top bar) were also removed. The `<p>` tip at **line 740** now reads:
```html
<p class="text-center text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2">💡 Tap card or FLIP to flip</p>
```
instead of the previous version that mentioned the keyboard shortcuts (`Tap card or press Space to flip · 1 2 3 to rate`).

---

### 2. Edit Button on Card -- MISSING

There is **no edit button (pencil icon) on the card** in the study screen. The card top-bar HTML at **lines 716-718** only shows FLIP and Exit buttons:

```js
// Lines 716-718 in renderStudyScreen()
<div class="flex gap-2">
    <button id="flipCardBtn" class="flip-btn px-3 py-1 md:px-4 md:py-1 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-xs font-bold">🔄 FLIP</button>
    <button id="exitStudyBtn" class="text-red-600 font-bold bg-red-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs">Exit</button>
</div>
```

The edit button that was present in previous versions looked like:
```js
${currentStudent?.is_admin ? `<a href="admin_cards.php?focus_card=${card.id}&return_url=${encodeURIComponent(window.location.href)}" target="_blank" class="text-xs p-1 text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 font-bold" title="Edit this card">✏️</a>` : ''}
```

This was moved around in commits `7c31781` (added next to set name), `f0d4fcc` (moved to top bar next to flip/exit), and then completely lost in the branch merge.

The only edit-related UI remaining is the **Edit Profile button** on the Welcome screen at **line 255** and its modal at **lines 413-456**.

---

### 3. `renderStudyScreen()` function -- lines 692-828

This is the main render function for the study screen. It generates:

| Section | Lines | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| All-caught-up view | 693-700 | Message when no cards left |
| Card HTML template | 709-742 | Generates the entire card UI |
| Flip handler | 747-773 | Handles card flip logic for all patterns |
| Event listeners | 775-796 | Click handlers for flip, exit, MCQ options |
| Review handler | 798-823 | `handleReview(quality)` - records review, advances card |
| Rating button listeners | 825-827 | againBtn(0), goodBtn(2), easyBtn(3) |

---

### 4. Root Cause: Branch Merge Regression

The features were **lost due to a branch/rebase issue**:

- Commit `58da15d` ("Full makeover: SM-2 algorithm, keyboard shortcuts, auto-flip, sound FX, gamification, confetti, search, interactive previews") **added** all these features (keyboard handler, edit button, `getIntervalPreview`, `SoundFX`, `streakDays`, `currentQuizState`, `isFlipped`, `allDueReviewed`, `spawnConfetti`, etc.)

- Commit `04cabbd` ("Phase 1: security & data integrity fixes") was **based on a version of app.js that predated `58da15d`** (it builds on `bfe3790`). This commit was then merged/parented to create commits `13f9855` -> `9ff12f9` -> `b5ffe46` -> `d65c923` (current HEAD).

**Verification:**
```
58da15d: has "Global keyboard shortcuts"     ✓
04cabbd: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗ (regression)
13f9855: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗
9ff12f9: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗
b5ffe46: does NOT have keyboard shortcuts    ✗
d65c923 (HEAD): does NOT have keyboard shortcuts ✗
```

The edit button on cards, the `getIntervalPreview()` function, `SoundFX`, `streakDays`, `currentQuizState`, `handleFlip()`, `handleAutoFlip()`, and `spawnConfetti()` were all lost in the same regression.

---

```
570:     }

572:     const cardEditorSection = document.getElementById('cardEditorSection');
573:     const userManagementSection = document.getElementById('userManagementSection');
574:     const userListContainer = document.getElementById('userListContainer');
575: 
576:     function showCardEditor() {
577:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.remove('hidden');
578:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.add('hidden');
579:     }
580: 
581:     function showUserManagement() {
582:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.add('hidden');
583:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.remove('hidden');
584:         loadUsers();
585:     }
586: 
587:     async function loadUsers() {
588:         if (!userListContainer) return;
589:         userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Loading users...</div>';
590: 
591:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_users&t=' + Date.now(), {
592:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
593:         });
594:         const data = await response.json();
595:         if (data.success && data.users) {
596:             renderUsers(data.users);
597:         } else {
598:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-4">Error loading users</div>';
599:         }
600:     }
601: 
602:     function renderUsers(users) {
603:         if (!users.length) {
604:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-4">No users found</div>';
605:             return;
606:         }
607: 
608:         let html = '<table class="w-full" style="border-collapse:collapse;">';
609:         html += '<tr><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Name</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Username</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Role</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Progress</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Level</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Actions</th></tr>';
610:         users.forEach(user => {
611:             html += `<tr>
612:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${escapeHtml(user.full_name || user.username)}</td>
613:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${escapeHtml(user.username)}</td>
614:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${user.is_admin ? '<span class="card-type mcq">Admin</span>' : '<span class="card-type text">Student</span>'}</td>
615:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${user.progress || 0}%</td>
616:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}</td>
617:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
618:                     <button class="edit-user-btn btn btn-primary text-xs" data-id="${user.id}" data-username="${escapeHtml(user.username)}" data-fullname="${escapeHtml(user.full_name || '')}" data-level="${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}" data-admin="${user.is_admin}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;">✏️ Edit</button>
619:                     <button class="reset-user-btn btn btn-warning text-xs" data-id="${user.id}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;">🔄 Reset</button>
620:                     <button class="delete-user-btn btn btn-danger text-xs" data-id="${user.id}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;">🗑 Delete</button>
621:                 </td>
622:             </tr>`;
623:         });
624:         html += '</table>';
625: 
626:         userListContainer.innerHTML = html;
627: 
628:         document.querySelectorAll('.edit-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
629:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
630:                 openEditUserModal(btn.dataset);
631:             });
632:         });
633: 
634:         document.querySelectorAll('.delete-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
635:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
636:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
637:                 if (confirm('Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.')) {
638:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_user&user_id=${userId}`, {
639:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
640:                     });
641:                     const result = await response.json();

643:                         loadUsers();
644:                     } else {

650:

655:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=reset_user_progress&user_id=${userId}`, {

673: 
674:         const modal = document.createElement('div');

680:                 <input type="hidden" id="editUserId" value="${data.id}">

682:                 <input type="text" id="editUserUsername" class="form-input" value="${data.username}" maxlength="30">
683:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
684:                 <input type="text" id="editUserFullName" class="form-input" value="${data.fullname}">
685:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>

689:                     <option value="Advanced" ${data.level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>

695:                 <div class="mt-3 mb-2">
```

This contains the "Add User" form and the "User List" container. The **edit user modal** is NOT hardcoded in the PHP file -- it is dynamically created in JavaScript (see section 2 below).

```
364:     <div id="userManagementSection" class="hidden">
365:         <div class="whiteboard-card">
366:             <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
367:                 <h2 class="text-2xl marker-underline">👥 Manage Users</h2>
368:                 <button id="backToCardsBtn" class="btn btn-secondary">← Back to Cards</button>
369:             </div>
370:

372:                 <div class="whiteboard-card" style="padding:16px;">
373:                     <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">➕ Add User</h3>
374:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Username:</label>

388:                         <span class="font-bold">Admin privileges</span>
389:                     </label>

391:                 </div>
392:

394:                     <div class="whiteboard-card" style="padding:16px;">
395:                         <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">📋 User List</h3>
```

## 2. JavaScript Functions for User Editing in `admin.js`

**File:** `/home/leonardo/Documents/Personal/Inglês/Aulas/materialLeo/ankiCards/flashcards/assets/js/admin.js`

### `showUserManagement()` and `loadUsers()` (lines 581-600)

```
581:     function showUserManagement() {
582:         if (cardEditorSection) cardEditorSection.classList.add('hidden');
583:         if (userManagementSection) userManagementSection.classList.remove('hidden');
584:         loadUsers();
585:     }
586: 
587:     async function loadUsers() {
588:         if (!userListContainer) return;
589:         userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-4"><div class="loader"></div> Loading users...</div>';
590: 
591:         const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_users&t=' + Date.now(), {
592:             headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
593:         });
594:         const data = await response.json();
595:         if (data.success && data.users) {
596:             renderUsers(data.users);
597:         } else {
598:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-red-500 py-4">Error loading users</div>';
599:         }
600:     }
```

### `renderUsers()` -- includes the "Edit" button with `data-level` attribute (lines 602-668)

This function renders the user table and attaches click handlers for edit, delete, and reset buttons. The **edit-user-btn** passes all user data via `data-*` attributes, including `data-level`.

```
602:     function renderUsers(users) {
603:         if (!users.length) {
604:             userListContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center text-gray-500 py-4">No users found</div>';
605:             return;
606:         }
607: 
608:         let html = '<table class="w-full" style="border-collapse:collapse;">';
609:         html += '<tr><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Name</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Username</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Role</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Progress</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Level</th><th style="text-align:left;padding:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;">Actions</th></tr>';
610:         users.forEach(user => {
611:             html += `<tr>
612:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${escapeHtml(user.full_name || user.username)}</td>
613:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${escapeHtml(user.username)}</td>
614:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${user.is_admin ? '<span class="card-type mcq">Admin</span>' : '<span class="card-type text">Student</span>'}</td>
615:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${user.progress || 0}%</td>
616:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}</td>
617:                 <td style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
618:                     <button class="edit-user-btn btn btn-primary text-xs" data-id="${user.id}" data-username="${escapeHtml(user.username)}" data-fullname="${escapeHtml(user.full_name || '')}" data-level="${escapeHtml(user.english_level || 'Beginner')}" data-admin="${user.is_admin}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;">✏️ Edit</button>
619:                     <button class="reset-user-btn btn btn-warning text-xs" data-id="${user.id}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;">🔄 Reset</button>
620:                     <button class="delete-user-btn btn btn-danger text-xs" data-id="${user.id}" style="padding:4px 10px;font-size:0.7rem;">🗑 Delete</button>
621:                 </td>
622:             </tr>`;
623:         });
624:         html += '</table>';
625: 
626:         userListContainer.innerHTML = html;
627: 
628:         document.querySelectorAll('.edit-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
629:             btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
630:                 openEditUserModal(btn.dataset);
631:             });
632:         });
633: 
634:         document.querySelectorAll('.delete-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
635:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
636:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
637:                 if (confirm('Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.')) {
638:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=delete_user&user_id=${userId}`, {
639:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
640:                     });
641:                     const result = await response.json();
642:                     if (result.success) {
643:                         loadUsers();
644:                     } else {
645:                         alert(result.error || 'Error deleting user');
646:                     }
647:                 }
648:             });
649:         });
650: 
651:         document.querySelectorAll('.reset-user-btn').forEach(btn => {
652:             btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
653:                 const userId = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
654:                 if (confirm('Reset all progress for this user? This will clear review history and progress.')) {
655:                     const response = await fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=reset_user_progress&user_id=${userId}`, {
656:                         headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' }
657:                     });
658:                     const result = await response.json();
659:                     if (result.success) {
660:                         alert('Progress reset successfully');
661:                         loadUsers();
662:                     } else {
663:                         alert(result.error || 'Error resetting progress');
664:                     }
665:                 }
666:             });
667:         });
668:     }
```

### `openEditUserModal()` -- the edit user modal (dynamically created) (lines 670-764)

This is where the **edit user dialog HTML** lives, including the **level field**. It also populates the level via `data.level`, and handles saving.

```
670:     function openEditUserModal(data) {
671:         const existing = document.getElementById('editUserModal');
672:         if (existing) existing.remove();
673: 
674:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
675:         modal.id = 'editUserModal';
676:         modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000;';
677:         modal.innerHTML = `
678:             <div class="whiteboard-card" style="max-width:500px;width:90%;padding:24px;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;">
679:                 <h3 class="text-lg marker-underline mb-3">✏️ Edit User</h3>
680:                 <input type="hidden" id="editUserId" value="${data.id}">
681:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Username:</label>
682:                 <input type="text" id="editUserUsername" class="form-input" value="${data.username}" maxlength="30">
683:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">Full Name:</label>
684:                 <input type="text" id="editUserFullName" class="form-input" value="${data.fullname}">
685:                 <label class="block font-bold mb-1">English Level:</label>
686:                 <select id="editUserLevel" class="form-select">
687:                     <option value="Beginner" ${data.level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}>🔰 Beginner</option>
688:                     <option value="Intermediate" ${data.level === 'Intermediate' ? 'selected' : ''}>📚 Intermediate</option>
689:                     <option value="Advanced" ${data.level === 'Advanced' ? 'selected' : ''}>🎓 Advanced</option>
690:                 </select>
691:                 <label class="flex items-center gap-2 my-2">
692:                     <input type="checkbox" id="editUserIsAdmin" value="1" ${data.admin === 'true' || data.admin === '1' ? 'checked' : ''}>
693:                     <span class="font-bold">Admin privileges</span>
694:                 </label>
695:                 <div class="mt-3 mb-2">
696:                     <label class="block font-bold mb-1">📚 Visible Card Sets:</label>
697:                     <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Leave all unchecked to show all sets</p>
698:                     <div id="userSetAccessContainer" class="space-y-1">
699:                         <div class="text-sm text-gray-400">Loading sets...</div>
700:                     </div>
701:                 </div>
702:                 <div class="flex gap-2 mt-3">
703:                     <button id="saveEditUserBtn" class="btn btn-success flex-1">💾 Save</button>
704:                     <button id="cancelEditUserBtn" class="btn btn-secondary flex-1">Cancel</button>
705:                 </div>
706:                 <p id="editUserError" class="text-red-600 text-center mt-2 hidden"></p>
707:             </div>
708:         `;
709:         document.body.appendChild(modal);
710: 
711:         // Load card sets and user's current access
712:         (async () => {
713:             const [setsRes, accessRes] = await Promise.all([
714:                 fetch('admin_cards.php?action=get_sets&t=' + Date.now(), { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } }),
715:                 fetch(`admin_cards.php?action=get_user_sets&user_id=${data.id}&t=${Date.now()}`, { headers: { 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } })
716:             ]);
717:             const setsData = await setsRes.json();
718:             const accessData = await accessRes.json();
719:             const allSets = setsData.success ? setsData.sets : [];
720:             const userSetIds = accessData.success ? accessData.set_ids : [];
721:             const container = document.getElementById('userSetAccessContainer');
722:             if (allSets.length === 0) {
723:                 container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-sm text-gray-400">No card sets available</div>';
724:             } else {
725:                 container.innerHTML = allSets.map(set => `
726:                     <label class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer">
727:                         <input type="checkbox" class="user-set-checkbox" value="${set.id}" ${userSetIds.includes(set.id) ? 'checked' : ''}>
728:                         ${escapeHtml(set.name)}
729:                     </label>
730:                 `).join('');
731:             }
732:         })();
733: 
734:         document.getElementById('cancelEditUserBtn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
735:         modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); });
736: 
737:         document.getElementById('saveEditUserBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
738:             const id = parseInt(document.getElementById('editUserId').value);
739:             const username = document.getElementById('editUserUsername').value.trim();
740:             const fullName = document.getElementById('editUserFullName').value.trim();
741:             const englishLevel = document.getElementById('editUserLevel').value;
742:             const isAdmin = document.getElementById('editUserIsAdmin').checked;
743: 
744:             if (!username) { alert('Username is required'); return; }
745: 
746:             const response = await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=update_user', {
747:                 method: 'POST',
748:                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
749:                 body: JSON.stringify({ id, username, full_name: fullName, english_level: englishLevel, is_admin: isAdmin })
750:             });
751:             const result = await response.json();
752:             if (!result.success) { alert(result.error || 'Error saving user'); return; }
753: 
754:             const checkedSets = [...document.querySelectorAll('.user-set-checkbox:checked')].map(cb => parseInt(cb.value));
755:             await fetch('admin_cards.php?action=set_user_sets', {
756:                 method: 'POST',
757:                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' },
758:                 body: JSON.stringify({ user_id: id, set_ids: checkedSets })
759:             });
760: 
761:             modal.remove();
762:             loadUsers();
763:         });
764:     }
```

### Button wiring in the initialization section (lines 827-829)

```
827:     document.getElementById('toggleUsersBtn')?.addEventListener('click', showUserManagement);
828:     document.getElementById('backToCardsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', showCardEditor);
829:     document.getElementById('createUserBtn')?.addEventListener('click', createUser);
```

---

## Summary

| Aspect | File | Lines |
|---|---|---|
| **Add User form HTML** (with level `<select>`) | `admin_cards.php` | 371-391 |
| **User list container** (placeholder for dynamic table) | `admin_cards.php` | 393-400 |
| **`showUserManagement()`** -- toggles visibility | `admin.js` | 581-585 |
| **`loadUsers()`** -- fetches user list from server | `admin.js` | 587-600 |
| **`renderUsers()`** -- renders user table, creates **edit-user-btn** with `data-level`, attaches click handlers | `admin.js` | 602-668 |
| **`openEditUserModal(data)`** -- dynamically creates the edit user modal with **level `<select>`** populated from `data.level`, loads card set checkboxes, and the **save handler** that reads `editUserLevel.value` and sends it in the update request | `admin.js` | 670-764 |
| **Button wiring** (`toggleUsersBtn`, `backToCardsBtn`, `createUserBtn`) | `admin.js` | 827-829 |

**Key observations about the level field in the edit modal:**

- The level `<select>` is defined at lines 686-690 of `admin.js` with three options: `Beginner`, `Intermediate`, `Advanced`.
- The currently selected option is set via `data.level` (from the `data-level` attribute of the clicked edit button), using inline ternary: `${data.level === 'Beginner' ? 'selected' : ''}` etc.
- On save (line 741), the level is read with `document.getElementById('editUserLevel').value` and sent as `english_level` in the JSON payload to `admin_cards.php?action=update_user` (line 749).

*[step-finish part]*
